name: Beppu SUGINOI HOTEL ORIX HOTELS & RESORTS
description:
Suginoi Hotel - Nơi lưu trú tuyệt vời ở Beppu, Nhật Bản

Suginoi Hotel là một khách sạn 4.0 sao tọa lạc tại thành phố Beppu, Nhật Bản. Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn này chỉ cách sân bay 40 phút đi xe và cách trung tâm thành phố 3.6 km.

Khách sạn này có tổng cộng 554 phòng, đảm bảo sẽ có đủ chỗ trống cho du khách. Quý khách có thể nhận phòng từ 03:00 PM và trả phòng trước 11:00 AM. Suginoi Hotel có chính sách đối với trẻ em, tuy nhiên, không cho phép trẻ em ở miễn phí. Có thể áp dụng các khoản phụ phí cho trẻ em.

Suginoi Hotel không chỉ nổi tiếng với vị trí thuận lợi mà còn với dịch vụ tuyệt vời. Khách sạn này cung cấp mọi tiện nghi và dịch vụ cần thiết để đảm bảo du khách có một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời. Hãy tận hưởng không gian thoải mái và sang trọng trong các phòng nghỉ tại đây, và khám phá những cảnh quan đẹp tại khu vườn của khách sạn.

Suginoi Hotel là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn khám phá thành phố Beppu. Với vị trí thuận lợi, dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp và tiện nghi hiện đại, khách sạn này sẽ mang đến cho quý khách một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ.

Suginoi Hotel - Nơi tận hưởng các tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng

Suginoi Hotel tọa lạc tại Beppu, Nhật Bản và được biết đến như một điểm đến lý tưởng cho việc thư giãn và giải trí. Khách sạn này cung cấp một loạt các tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng để đáp ứng nhu cầu của du khách.

Suginoi Hotel có nhiều cửa hàng đa dạng, nơi bạn có thể mua sắm và tìm kiếm những món quà đặc biệt. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có một quầy bar thân thiện, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các loại đồ uống phong phú và thư giãn sau một ngày dạo chơi.

Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và làm mới cơ thể, Suginoi Hotel cũng có các tiện ích như phòng xông hơi, phòng xông hơi nóng, phòng xông hơi ướt và spa. Bạn có thể thả mình trong không gian thư giãn này và tận hưởng những liệu pháp làm đẹp và chăm sóc sức khỏe chuyên nghiệp. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có phòng trò chơi và cửa hàng quà tặng/suvenir, mang đến cho bạn những trải nghiệm giải trí đầy thú vị.

Tiện nghi thể thao tại Suginoi Hotel

Suginoi Hotel tọa lạc tại Beppu, Nhật Bản, là một kỳ quan của các tiện nghi thể thao. Khách sạn này có một hồ bơi trong nhà rộng lớn, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng một buổi tập luyện thú vị và thư giãn trong không gian thoáng đãng. Ngoài ra, Suginoi Hotel cũng cung cấp một trung tâm thể dục hiện đại với các thiết bị tập luyện tiên tiến, giúp bạn duy trì sức khỏe và thể hình. Đối với những ai muốn tận hưởng không gian ngoài trời, khách sạn còn có một hồ bơi ngoài trời tuyệt đẹp, nơi bạn có thể tắm nắng và thư giãn trong không gian xanh mát.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Suginoi Hotel

Suginoi Hotel tọa lạc tại Beppu, Nhật Bản, là một khách sạn đáng chú ý với nhiều tiện ích tiện lợi. Khách sạn cung cấp các hòm đựng đồ an toàn để đảm bảo an ninh cho khách. Khách sạn cũng có Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực công cộng, giúp du khách tiếp tục kết nối với thế giới bên ngoài. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có khu vực hút thuốc riêng biệt để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách. 

Suginoi Hotel còn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt ủi và lưu trữ hành lý, giúp du khách tiện lợi trong việc quản lý đồ đạc cá nhân. Nếu bạn cần gì đó để giải quyết đau đầu về đồ ăn uống hay nhu cầu mua sắm, khách sạn cũng có máy bán hàng tự động và cửa hàng tiện lợi. Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày và khu vực giặt là cũng có sẵn để đảm bảo sự thoải mái và tiện nghi cho khách hàng.

Tiện ích vận chuyển tại Suginoi Hotel

Suginoi Hotel tọa lạc tại Beppu, Nhật Bản, và cung cấp nhiều tiện ích vận chuyển để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khách sạn có bãi đỗ xe rộng rãi, nơi bạn có thể tự gửi xe một cách dễ dàng và tiện lợi. Đặc biệt, bãi đỗ xe tại Suginoi Hotel được cung cấp miễn phí, giúp bạn tiết kiệm chi phí khi đến và đi từ khách sạn.

Tiện nghi phòng tại Suginoi Hotel - Tiện lợi và thoải mái

Suginoi Hotel tọa lạc tại Beppu, Nhật Bản, mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Với những tiện nghi hiện đại, phòng nghỉ tại khách sạn này sẽ đảm bảo sự thoải mái và tiện lợi cho quý khách.

Mỗi phòng nghỉ tại Suginoi Hotel được trang bị máy lạnh hiện đại, giúp du khách luôn có thể cảm thấy mát mẻ và thoải mái trong những ngày nghỉ. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn cũng cung cấp máy sấy tóc tiện dụng, giúp du khách có thể tạo kiểu tóc dễ dàng và tiện lợi.

Không chỉ vậy, mỗi phòng nghỉ còn được trang bị truyền hình và tủ lạnh, giúp du khách có thể giải trí và lưu trữ thức uống và thực phẩm một cách dễ dàng. Với những tiện nghi này, quý khách sẽ có một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại Suginoi Hotel.

Trải nghiệm ẩm thực đặc sắc tại Suginoi Hotel

Suginoi Hotel tọa lạc tại Beppu, Nhật Bản, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực đặc sắc. Khách sạn này cung cấp những tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng.

Với nhà hàng nằm trong khuôn viên, bạn có thể tận hưởng các món ăn tuyệt vời mà không cần rời khỏi khách sạn. Nhà hàng tại Suginoi Hotel phục vụ các món ăn đa dạng từ ẩm thực Nhật Bản truyền thống đến các món ăn quốc tế. Bạn có thể thưởng thức các món sushi tươi ngon, mì ramen thơm ngon hay các món ăn hấp dẫn khác. 

Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày để đảm bảo không gian ở của bạn luôn sạch sẽ và thoải mái. Đặc biệt, khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ buffet sáng phong phú, giúp bạn bắt đầu ngày mới với năng lượng đầy đủ. Với nhiều lựa chọn từ các món ăn truyền thống Nhật Bản đến các món ăn quốc tế, bạn sẽ có một trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Suginoi Hotel.

Các loại phòng đa dạng tại Beppu SUGINOI HOTEL dành cho mọi nhu cầu

Tại Beppu SUGINOI HOTEL, quý khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng phù hợp với sở thích và ngân sách của mình. Bạn có thể chọn phòng SORA KAN Premium Standard với tầm nhìn ra đại dương hoặc núi, mỗi phòng đều rộng rãi từ 33 đến 36 mét vuông, mang đến không gian thoải mái để thư giãn sau ngày dài khám phá. Ngoài ra, các phòng SORA KAN Standard Twin hay Deluxe cũng mang đến trải nghiệm tuyệt vời với diện tích từ 26 đến 51 mét vuông, có thể chứa từ 2 đến 4 khách, phù hợp cho gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn. Đối với những ai muốn trải nghiệm sự sang trọng, phòng Junior Suite với tầm nhìn ra biển rộng 66 mét vuông sẽ là lựa chọn lý tưởng, mang lại không gian cao cấp và tiện nghi đẳng cấp.

Đặt phòng qua Agoda không chỉ giúp bạn tiếp cận giá tốt nhất mà còn mang lại trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, nhanh chóng và không gặp rắc rối. Bạn có thể lựa chọn từ nhiều loại phòng đa dạng, đảm bảo phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu du lịch hoặc công tác. Với các ưu đãi hấp dẫn và quy trình đặt phòng đơn giản, Agoda giúp bạn yên tâm tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại Beppu mà không cần lo lắng về thủ tục hay giá cả.

Khám phá vùng đất nhiều suối nước nóng tại Beppu, Nhật Bản

Beppu, thành phố nằm ở phía đông của đảo Kyushu, Nhật Bản, nổi tiếng với hơn 2.800 suối nước nóng và các địa điểm du lịch liên quan đến nó. Với khí hậu ấm áp và nhiều nguồn nước nóng tự nhiên, Beppu là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn thư giãn và tận hưởng những trải nghiệm thú vị.

Suginoi Hotel, một trong những khách sạn nổi tiếng tại Beppu, tọa lạc trên đỉnh núi với tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp ra biển và thành phố. Khách sạn này nằm trong một khu vườn rộng lớn và có các tiện nghi cao cấp như hồ bơi ngoài trời, nhà hàng, spa và phòng tập thể dục. Du khách có thể thư giãn trong các bồn tắm nước nóng riêng tư và tận hưởng các liệu pháp mát-xa truyền thống Nhật Bản.

Cách di chuyển từ sân bay gần Beppu đến Suginoi Hotel

Suginoi Hotel, nằm tại thành phố Beppu, Nhật Bản, là một điểm đến nổi tiếng với khách du lịch khắp nơi. Để đến Suginoi Hotel từ sân bay gần nhất, bạn có một số lựa chọn tiện lợi và dễ dàng. 

Nếu bạn đến từ Sân bay quốc tế Oita (OIT), có hai phương tiện chính để đến Suginoi Hotel. Đầu tiên, bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt đến ga Beppu, mất khoảng 50 phút. Từ ga Beppu, Suginoi Hotel chỉ cách khoảng 10 phút đi bộ. Thứ hai, bạn có thể chọn dịch vụ taxi từ sân bay, mất khoảng 40 phút để đến trực tiếp Suginoi Hotel.

Nếu bạn đến từ Sân bay quốc tế Fukuoka (FUK), có một số tùy chọn để đến Suginoi Hotel. Đầu tiên, bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt hoặc tàu điện từ sân bay đến ga Hakata, sau đó chuyển sang tàu Shinkansen đến ga Beppu. Từ ga Beppu, Suginoi Hotel chỉ cách khoảng 10 phút đi bộ. Thứ hai, bạn có thể chọn dịch vụ xe buýt trực tiếp từ sân bay đến Suginoi Hotel, mất khoảng 2 giờ. Bất kể phương tiện bạn chọn, hành trình từ sân bay đến Suginoi Hotel sẽ đem lại cho bạn những trải nghiệm thú vị và tiện lợi.

Khám phá những địa danh nổi tiếng gần Suginoi Hotel

Suginoi Hotel tọa lạc gần một số địa danh nổi tiếng ở Beppu, Nhật Bản. Khách sạn này nằm gần Hells of Beppu, Umi Jigoku, Jigokumushikobo Kannawa, Suối nước nóng Chinoike Jjigoku và Tháp Beppu. Với vị trí thuận lợi này, du khách có thể dễ dàng khám phá những địa điểm nổi tiếng này và trải nghiệm vẻ đẹp tự nhiên độc đáo của Beppu.

Ngoài ra, Suginoi Hotel cũng gần Suginoi Palace, Tatsumaki Jogoku, Statue of Kumahachi Aburaya, Kamado Jigoku và Yukemuri Observatory. Du khách có thể tận hưởng không gian yên tĩnh và thư giãn tại khách sạn trước khi khám phá những địa danh này. Từ Yukemuri Observatory, du khách có thể ngắm nhìn toàn cảnh Beppu với những cột khói nổi bật từ các suối nước nóng. Đây là một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời để khám phá vẻ đẹp tự nhiên đặc biệt của Beppu.

Các ga giao thông công cộng gần Suginoi Hotel tại Beppu, Nhật Bản

Suginoi Hotel nằm gần các ga giao thông công cộng quan trọng tại Beppu, Nhật Bản, bao gồm Onigase Railway Station và Nhà ga Beppu. Onigase Railway Station chỉ cách khách sạn vài bước chân, là nơi lý tưởng để khám phá vùng đất này. Từ đó, du khách có thể dễ dàng di chuyển đến các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng khác như Beppu Ropeway. 

Beppu Ropeway cũng nằm gần Suginoi Hotel, chỉ cách đó vài phút đi bộ. Đây là một phương tiện thú vị để khám phá vùng núi xung quanh Beppu. Du khách có thể lên Ropeway và tận hưởng cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp từ trên cao. Bên cạnh đó, Nhà ga Beppu cũng chỉ cách khách sạn một khoảng cách ngắn, cung cấp nhiều tuyến đường đi đến các thành phố lân cận và các địa điểm du lịch khác. Với vị trí thuận lợi này, việc di chuyển và khám phá Beppu sẽ trở nên dễ dàng và tiện lợi hơn bao giờ hết.

Nhà hàng xung quanh Suginoi Hotel

Suginoi Hotel nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng nổi tiếng, bao gồm Kamesho Kurukuru Sushi, một nhà hàng sushi nổi tiếng với các món sushi tươi ngon và đa dạng. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức các món ăn truyền thống Nhật Bản, hãy đến Restaurant Toyoken, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn tuyệt vời như sushi, sashimi và ramen. Amamichaya là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức các món ăn địa phương như udon và soba. Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm hương vị độc đáo của Beppu, hãy đến Jigoku Mushi, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn được nấu bằng hơi nước nhiệt đới. Yusha Halal Restaurant là một nhà hàng halal tuyệt vời, phục vụ các món ăn ngon lành và phù hợp với người Hồi giáo. Nếu bạn đang tìm kiếm một nơi để thưởng thức món ăn nhanh, hãy đến Toyotsune Beppu Station Branch hoặc Restaurant Ribbon. Suiten Beppu Yamanoteten là một nhà hàng sang trọng với các món ăn đa dạng và phong cách phục vụ tuyệt vời. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực Ấn Độ, hãy đến Purunima Indian Restaurant. Cuối cùng, Robata Jin là một nhà hàng nổi tiếng với các món ăn nướng truyền thống Nhật Bản. Với sự đa dạng và chất lượng của những nhà hàng này, bạn sẽ không bao giờ cảm thấy chán khi lưu trú tại Suginoi Hotel.

Các điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng gần Suginoi Hotel

Suginoi Hotel nằm gần nhiều điểm mua sắm phổ biến tại Beppu. Khách sạn chỉ cách Bamboo Bamboo và platform04 vài bước chân. Đối diện Suginoi Hotel là YouMe Town Beppu, một trung tâm mua sắm lớn với nhiều cửa hàng và nhà hàng. Nếu bạn muốn khám phá thêm các cửa hàng và quầy bán hàng độc đáo, hãy đến Port Station Beppu Traffic Center và Tokiwa Beppu. Ngoài ra, Ekimachi 1Chome Beppu cũng là một điểm đến thú vị cho những người yêu thích mua sắm. Với vị trí thuận lợi gần các điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng, Suginoi Hotel là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những du khách muốn khám phá và mua sắm tại Beppu.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Suginoi Hotel so với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố Beppu

Suginoi Hotel tọa lạc tại thành phố Beppu, Nhật Bản, là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ. Với giá phòng trung bình là $360, Suginoi Hotel mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng và đẳng cấp. So với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố Beppu là $192, Suginoi Hotel có mức giá cao hơn nhưng xứng đáng với những tiện nghi và dịch vụ tuyệt vời mà khách hàng sẽ được hưởng thụ. Với không gian phòng rộng rãi, thiết kế tinh tế và cảnh quan đẹp mắt, Suginoi Hotel là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ thú vị và đáng nhớ.

Suginoi Hotel - Nơi lưu lại những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ

Suginoi Hotel là một khách sạn tuyệt vời với cảnh đẹp, tiện nghi tốt nhất và dịch vụ chất lượng. Tôi sẽ giới thiệu khách sạn này cho mọi loại du khách. Tôi yêu khách sạn này, bạn là tuyệt nhất! Tôi sẽ quay lại vào năm sau. Cảnh đẹp, đồ ăn ngon và nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình. Phòng rộng rãi và sạch sẽ. Một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời với phòng rộng rãi, bữa ăn tuyệt vời. Tôi sẽ quay lại. Khách sạn sạch sẽ và đẹp. Một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời đối với chúng tôi và chúng tôi sẽ quay lại sớm. Bữa tối và bữa sáng thật ngon lành.

Suginoi Hotel: Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời với đánh giá cao từ khách hàng

Suginoi Hotel, một khách sạn nằm ở Beppu, Nhật Bản, đã nhận được đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng của mình. Với tổng điểm đánh giá 8.9 trên 10, đây là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời.

Khách sạn được đánh giá cao về cả giá trị và tiện nghi. Với điểm đánh giá 8.8 cho giá trị, Suginoi Hotel mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm tốt với giá cả hợp lý. Điểm đánh giá 9.3 cho tiện nghi cũng chứng tỏ rằng khách sạn này có đủ các tiện ích hiện đại để đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng.

Ngoài ra, Suginoi Hotel cũng nhận được đánh giá cao về sự sạch sẽ, với điểm đánh giá 9.0. Điều này chứng tỏ rằng khách sạn luôn đảm bảo vệ sinh và sạch sẽ để mang đến cho khách hàng một môi trường sống và nghỉ ngơi thoải mái. Đánh giá 9.1 cho cả sự thoải mái và hiệu suất của nhân viên cũng cho thấy rằng khách sạn này không chỉ đảm bảo sự thoải mái cho khách hàng mà còn có đội ngũ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp và thân thiện sẵn sàng phục vụ.

Tiện ích tại cơ sở lưu trú

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text:
Tôi đã nghỉ lại ở khách sạn Hoshi-kan. Căn phòng nhìn ra phía núi, rất rộng rãi và có một chiếc ghế sofa lớn, tôi đã có những giờ phút thoải mái ở đây. Nhà hàng ở tầng cao nhất có bữa sáng và bữa tối buffet với view nhìn ra vịnh Beppu, mặc dù có nhiều khách nhưng không quá đông đúc nên tôi có thể dễ dàng mang đồ ăn. Trong bữa tối, tôi cũng có thể uống rượu thoải mái 

Khách sạn rất rộng và tôi đã đi bộ khá nhiều, nhưng do ăn uống nhiều nên việc đi lại vừa đủ khiến tôi cảm thấy thoải mái. Vào buổi tối, tôi đã xem được chương trình biểu diễn đài phun nước và ánh sáng chiếu, còn có cả sân bowling, hồ bơi và Gold's Gym nữa, cuộc sống tại khách sạn thật sự rất tuyệt vời. Suối nước nóng cũng rất tốt! Tôi muốn quay lại!
sample_comments.title: Một khách sạn giải trí lớn!
sample_comments.room_type: Bữa Sáng Tự Chọn và Bữa Tối Bao Gồm - Ăn Uống Hoshi - Phòng Tiêu Chuẩn Hoshi Kan với Hướng Núi 35 M²

sample_comments.title: Great!
sample_comments.positives: Very big hotel with all the amenities. Good breakfast. parking is close and they have transportation to and from there. Also offer a bus into town and to the railway station.
sample_comments.negatives: A bit off the center on a hill.

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Great family resort, alot to do, water park, onsen, spa, arcade, bowling.
sample_comments.negatives: Hard to communicate with staff, mostly do not speak English.

sample_comments.text: Absolute gem of a place. Unfortunately didn't get to make the most of our rooms as we were late coming home from rugby match. We used pool following day.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text:
主人 của tôi đã nghỉ hưu và chúng tôi đã ở lại khách sạn Beppu Suginokai "Chuku-kan" mà chúng tôi đã muốn thử nghiệm từ lâu!
Nó mới và có độ cao lớn, vì vậy cả cơ sở và cảnh sắc đều rất đẹp.
Nhân viên cũng rất thân thiện, họ đã giúp mang hành lý ngay khi chúng tôi đến và dẫn chúng tôi đến quầy lễ tân.
Chúng tôi được đưa đến cửa hàng tiện lợi ở dưới 200m bằng xe buýt nhỏ, điều này thực sự rất hữu ích.
Suối nước nóng có một bồn tắm lớn đặc biệt dành cho "Chuku-kan", nhưng có hàng rào cao để không nhìn thấy từ bên ngoài, vì vậy bạn sẽ phải đi bộ một chút, nhưng bồn tắm Shelving có cảnh đẹp hơn và nhiều loại hơn, với phòng xông hơi bằng kính hoàn chỉnh, nên chỗ này tốt hơn.
Bữa ăn được phục vụ tại khu vực dành riêng cho "Chuku-kan", có đồ uống tự do (bao gồm cả rượu) và nhiều món ăn được chế biến ngay trước mặt, đối với người thích đồ ngọt như tôi, món Mont Blanc được làm bằng máy nhỏ giọt từ bánh bông lan thật tuyệt vời!
Quy mô thật sự quá lớn để tận hưởng chỉ trong một ngày, vì vậy lần tới tôi mong muốn chinh phục toàn bộ khu vực.
Tôi cảm thấy đây là khách sạn tốt nhất mà tôi đã từng ở.
Khi đặt phòng qua agoda, có nhiều sự cố không vui (đặt phòng không được xác nhận, bữa sáng cho 2 người chỉ cho 1 người, phòng ở tầng thấp hoặc có lý do đặc biệt), nhưng lần này, có vẻ như nhờ tôi đã đặt trước 6 tháng? Phòng ở tầng cao rất đẹp, vì vậy tôi rất hài lòng!
sample_comments.title: Cảnh đẹp, dịch vụ phục vụ và suối nước nóng đều tuyệt vời!
sample_comments.response:
この度は別府温泉杉乃井ホテルを御利用いただきまして誠にありがとうございます。
また、ご多用の中、口コミをご投稿いただきました事、重ねてお礼申し上げます。
数多あるホテル旅館の中から、ご主人様のご退職という大切な節目のご旅行に、当ホテルをお選びいただきましたこと、心よりお祝い申し上げます。
宙館でのご滞在につきまして、景色や施設、スタッフの対応に至るまでご満足いただけたご様子を拝見し、大変嬉しく存じます。また、ご到着時のご案内や送迎サービスにつきましてもお役に立てたとのこと、何よりでございます。
温泉につきましては、それぞれの魅力をお楽しみいただけたご様子が窺え、お食事もライブキッチンやスイーツなどをご堪能いただけたようで「今まで泊まったホテルで一番」とのお言葉まで頂戴し、身に余る光栄でございます。
これからも皆様にご満足いただけるご滞在をご提供できますよう、より一層サービス向上に努めてまいります。
ぜひ次回は館内のさまざまな施設もご体験いただき、さらにお楽しみいただけましたら幸いでございます。スタッフ一同、心よりお待ち申し上げております。
sample_comments.room_type: Bao Gồm Bữa Sáng Tự Chọn và Bữa Tối – Terrace and Dining Sora – Sora Kan Tiêu Chuẩn 2 Giường Đơn, Hướng Núi 26 m²

sample_comments.title: wonderful
sample_comments.positives:
the facility, the staff
the best family hotel

the breakfast is ordinary too. i Like it so much

but what make me dissapoint
why dont tell us there is pool that we have to use swimming suit , because its so nearly impossible on winter trip we bring swimming suit .

but overall its a good stay.
sample_comments.negatives: the poor information

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Great family resort, alot to do, water park, onsen, spa, arcade, bowling.
sample_comments.negatives: Hard to communicate with staff, mostly do not speak English.

sample_comments.text: โรงแรมใหญ่มาก มีสิ่งอำนวยความสะดวกครบทุกอย่าง มีรถรับส่งจากสถานีเบปปุ มีออนเซ็นชมวิว หลายจุด อาหารดีมากทุกมื้อ ห้องขนาดใหญ่มากค่ะ โดยรวมHappy มากๆ
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text: Trong chuyến du lịch 4 đêm 5 ngày, tôi đã ở tại khách sạn ở thành phố Fukuoka vào ngày đầu tiên và ngày cuối cùng, nhưng vì nó quá chật chội và không thoải mái, mà Bếppu Suginoi thực sự tuyệt vời. Căn phòng rộng rãi và sạch sẽ, hơn nữa, suối nước nóng và bữa sáng, bữa tối buffet rất tuyệt vời so với giá cả. Nhược điểm duy nhất là chúng tôi đã sử dụng xe thuê nên bãi đậu xe và phòng ở khá xa nhau. Tuy nhiên, xe đưa đón từ bãi đậu xe thường xuyên nên không hề bất tiện. Tôi không muốn trở lại thành phố Fukuoka nên lần sau tôi dự định chỉ ở khách sạn Bếppu Suginoi 4 đêm. Nhưng mà giá khách sạn vẫn không giảm. À, tôi khuyên những ai đi đến đó nên chọn Sora-kan.
sample_comments.title: Khách sạn Suginoi tuyệt vời nhất
sample_comments.response:
소중한 후기 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
4박 5일 일정 중 벳푸 스기노이 호텔에서의 시간이 가장 만족스러우셨다니 저희에게는 최고의 칭찬입니다. 객실의 넓이와 청결함, 온천, 조식과 저녁 뷔페까지 가격 대비 훌륭했다고 말씀해 주셔서 진심으로 기쁩니다.
렌터카를 이용하셔서 주차장과 객실 간 거리가 다소 멀게 느껴지셨다는 점은 불편을 드려 죄송합니다. 다행히 셔틀버스를 통해 큰 불편 없이 이용하셨다니 안심이 됩니다. 앞으로도 더욱 편리하게 이용하실 수 있도록 지속적으로 개선해 나가겠습니다.
다음에는 벳푸 스기노이 호텔에서만 4박을 계획하고 계시다니 정말 감사한 말씀입니다. 숙박 요금에 대해서도 부담을 느끼신다는 점을 잘 알고 있으며, 가격에 걸맞은, 그 이상으로 만족하실 수 있는 경험을 제공하기 위해 계속 노력하겠습니다.
소라칸을 추천해 주신 점도 감사드립니다. 다음 방문에서도 다시 한 번 최고의 추억을 만들어 드릴 수 있기를 기대하겠습니다.
다시 뵙기를 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng HOSHI KAN Tiêu Chuẩn Hướng Đại Dương

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: The view was lovely and the room was very nicely furnished. The service was excellent. The onsens were also wonderful.

sample_comments.title: Not for foreigners
sample_comments.text: Staff are impolite in general and gave priority to local guests. Poor communication in English.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for taking the time to write a review. 
But we are sorry that you had such an experience during your stay, and it shouldn't have been happened! Not all of staff are able to speak English, but we will try to improve our skills. 
Moreover, please ask for translation system for the next time. We can ask the operator on the phone or on the tablet. We are sorry we couldn't help you this time.
We are sorry about the situation once again.
Sincerely yours
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: Everything fun costs extra and is not included in the room price. It's a ripoff.

sample_comments.title: very diappointed
sample_comments.text: The hotel is very old need renovation.

sample_comments.title: Overcrowding makes hygiene problems
sample_comments.text:
Very big hotel served about over 2000 guesses in the day of my reserve. The problem was too many people walking around and used the hot spring. I disgusted a wet floor and bad smell in the changing room. I discomforted when I ate in densely dinning room. Overall quality of the hotel turned down under overcrowding situation.
BTW, the living room was great; big window overlooking the downtown. Don't forget, the price was not cheap.

sample_comments.title: Ok, but poor value for money.
sample_comments.positives: Room was good. Staff very good. Variety of things to do.
sample_comments.negatives:
Very poor value for money.
Excessive number of stairs with no lift or elevator options.
Buffet was average.
Limited time window for meals due to congestion.

sample_comments.title: The room is quite dirty and super strong overnight food smell which is super disgusting
sample_comments.text: The room is quite dirty and super strong overnight food smell which is super disgusting, actually we will not have dinner in room . Recommend for family with kids the hotel is big people are nice, but I will not recommend for my friends or family.

sample_comments.title: This hotel aspires to draw foreign visitors, but it has the mentality of the traditional ryokan.
sample_comments.positives: A great selection of food for breakfast buffet and the nice view looking down the town of Beppu. Loved the hot springs at the Sora Kan. Free shuttle service to the Beppu stations is great.
sample_comments.negatives: The hotel did not give us any heads up on their restaurants requiring advanced dinner reservations even for buffet! When we checked in, we found out that the restaurant was already fully booked for the duration of our stay. So we ended up eating out in town every night. And the town does not have many restaurants suited for visitors from western countries. The room had no drawers or shelves for keeping cloths. The hotel does even provide laundry services. When I asked the front desk about it, I was told to go to a coin laundry in another building.

sample_comments.title: 8th hell of Beppu
sample_comments.text: AVOID if you have tattoos. Hotel does not accept tattoed people to their extensive onsen areas. Cancellation is inpossible, no compensation or support from staff. They only suggest you pay extra for a private bath.

sample_comments.title: Too crowded
sample_comments.text: If you prefer to enjoy and relax in this hotel, please think twice. It is too crowded even on weekday and you cannot imagine the state in weekend. You have to queue everytime for breakfast and dinner (weekday and weekend). The hotel is full of tour buses almost everyday when I stayed there. Good thing is room are clean and staffs are attentive. However onsen, restaurant, bowling , gaming etc are all full of people. It may be good for families gathering but not good for a relax get away.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Suginoi Hotel and for taking the time to share your honest feedback.
We sincerely apologize that your stay did not meet your expectations, particularly regarding the level of crowding throughout the hotel. We understand that long queues for meals and busy facilities such as the onsen, bowling, and gaming areas can make it difficult to relax, and we regret any inconvenience this may have caused during your visit.
At the same time, we truly appreciate your kind comments about the cleanliness of our rooms and the attentiveness of our staff. Your recognition is a great encouragement to our team.
As a large resort hotel, we welcome many guests, including group travelers, which can lead to busy periods. However, we take your feedback seriously and will continue working on improving guest flow, reservation systems, and overall comfort so that all guests can enjoy a more relaxing stay.
We are grateful for your valuable input and hope to have the opportunity t
sample_comments.room_type: Breakfast Included at Wa Dining Hoshi: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Mountain View

sample_comments.title: Air-conditioning system and washing toilet all did not work in our 2 rooms
sample_comments.text:
The air conditioning system in our 2 rooms (a group of 5 persons) all did not work. After making a complaint, you were given a electric fan instead and you were strongly recommended to open the windows for ventilation if you insisted it was not a good solution.
In addition, the washing toilet in our 2 rooms all did not work. You had to use your normal way to clean your bottom, no problem at all to us. However, should it happen in a expensive hotel in Japan?
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for taking the time to write a review. But we are very sorry that our air conditioning didn't work well. Since our air conditioning is central controlled, we cannot change the temperature of every rooms. 
We are sorry for the situation. Regarding to the washlet, we are sorry about the problem too. 
We have checked your room and now the washlet seems working OK but we have shared your review with our management meeting and making sure it will not happen again.
We are sorry about the situation once again.
Sincerely yours
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Buffet was great but onsen was disappointing.
sample_comments.text: Staff also need to learn English! Require better signage for visitors from English speaking country. I have been waiting for the shuttle bus I front of where the shuttle bus stops but been told to line up in side the hotel where only indicated in Japanese when the shuttle bus came. We almost missed the train due to this. I thought Japanese are polite people but the staff here were arrogant in my opinion.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel but worst cs
sample_comments.text:
I enquired a child rate 10 days in advanced at least since they hotel's staff was using template to ans so they didn't provide options and clear information to guest so I guess as holiday mood they expect ppl are willing to pay additional. That's the part I really annoyed other than this it is a wonderful place to stay in Beppu 
I stayed in 3 different hotels in Beppu, there was no communication problem with others but only this hotel
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the frustration you experienced regarding the child rate inquiry. We understand how important clear and personalized information is, especially when planning a family trip, and regret that our response did not meet your expectations.
We are, however, pleased to hear that you enjoyed your overall stay and found our hotel to be a wonderful place in Beppu. Your comments will be shared with our team so we can improve communication and provide more attentive service in the future.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and offer a seamless experience next time.
sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Great hotel but worst customer services

I enquired a child rate 10 days in advanced at least since they hotel's staff was using template to ans so they didn't provide options and clear information to guest so I guess as holiday mood they expect ppl are willing to pay additional. That's the part I really annoyed other than this it is a wonderful place to stay in Beppu 
I stayed in 3 different hotels in Beppu, there was no communication problem with others but only this hotel

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the confusion and frustration you experienced regarding the child rate inquiry. We understand how important clear and accurate information is, especially when planning a family trip, and we regret that our response did not meet your expectations.
We are glad to hear that aside from this issue, you enjoyed your stay and found our hotel to be a wonderful place in Beppu. Your comments will be shared with our team to improve communication and ensure future guests receive clear and helpful information.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide a seamless experience next time.
sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Deluxe Room with Tatami Area and Ocean View,2504

sample_comments.title: Not bad but...
sample_comments.text:
The staffs were not kind and not able to speak English which made us un-comfortable.

Our first room smelled so bad so we requested to change the room even though the check-in line was so long that it took more than 30 minutes.
However they said nothing to us. It is not that I expect an apology however they didn't say sorry to us which made me a little bit upset.

Regarding English, even I said to them "Hello" or "Excuse me" all the staffs spoke in Japanese in return! 
Due to the language problem, I didn't able to understand rules regarding this hotel's facilities such as oncen, swimming pool and buffet restaurant.

I still can't believe staffs in 5 stars hotel don't speak English at all. 
I have to say that it's an overpriced hotel and just for Japanese people.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your recent experience at our hotel. We deeply regret to learn that your stay did not meet your expectations and that you encountered multiple issues during your time with us.

First and foremost, please accept our sincerest apologies for the discomfort and inconvenience you experienced. We are truly sorry that the room initially assigned to you had an unpleasant odor, and that despite the long wait at check-in, your request for a room change was not handled with the courtesy and communication you rightfully expected. Our team should have responded with more attentiveness and care, and we deeply regret that this was not the case.

We are particularly sorry to hear that our staff's English proficiency was insufficient, leading to confusion regarding hotel facilities such as the shower usage, pool rules, and buffet restaurant guidelines. We completely understand how frustrating it must have been to not receive proper assistance in a langua
sample_comments.room_type: SORA KAN Standard Twin Room with Mountain View and Shower

sample_comments.title: Disappointed can't use the rooftop hot spring pool
sample_comments.text: Booked from Agoda coz attracted by the photo of the rooftop pool. When I checked in, I was told I could not use that facility coz I did not stayed in the same building! There were three buildings under the hotel. I guessed this was Agoda's problem which they did not state clearly the building name! The pictures also misleading! The hotel check in counter staff could not communicate in English, even very simple English!
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for taking the time to give us your feedback. We are sorry that your impression of us was not exceeding the expectations. We will try to improve our service and facility and hoping to make your next visit happier. 
We are looking forward to welcoming you again in near future. 
Yours sincerely
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Good but not great
sample_comments.positives: Best part of stay---onsen on 13th floor. Clean and relaxing place to hang out
sample_comments.negatives:
Dinner buffet @ Ceada Palace was okay, not as good as I expected. Getting to venue not easy for elderly if walking. 
Choices of food were ok but not great. Hotel stay package with Ceada Palace buffet bit expensive. Breakfast buffet near hotel lobby was more convenient and of better quality. Little chaotic because of summer crowd. Should have an English speaking employee available each shift.

sample_comments.title: Not bad, but not good neither.
sample_comments.text: Good facility and stunning sea view but dining experience is far from satisfactory. Can have better choice at this price level.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for taking the time to give us your feedback. We are sorry that your impression of us was not exceeding the expectations. We will try to improve our service and facility and hoping to make your next visit happier. 
We are looking forward to welcoming you again in near future. 
Yours sincerely
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Good experience
sample_comments.positives: Buffet Breakfast and buffet dinner are amazing. Plenty of choices to choose from. Staffs are really professional and attentive to your needs. A lot of parking spaces and free for the hotel guests. There is a coin laundry facility next to the hotel which is amazing. The outdoor public baths are awesome as well. Remember to bring your swimsuit when using the outdoor bath as it is like a swimming pool. The indoor onsen was good with a reasonable size. There is a 7-11 nearby so if you need something urgent, you can go there.
sample_comments.negatives: Since it is a big hotel, we were staying at Niji Loft and when using the indoor onsen it was way too noisy, the people were just talking with loud voices at one another and no staff telling them to lower their voices. So, what I expected to be a calm and nice environment turned out to be quite hectic. The staff were there but I don't think that they were told to remind guests to lower their voices. Buffet dinners are more crowded than breakfast. The AC is too warm for our family's liking.

sample_comments.title: Too many people. Room is big but old and dark. Buffet is ok.
sample_comments.text:
The onsen shown in the web is in the new building. If you stay in the main building, you need to take a shuttle bus. There is also an onsen in the main building but there is nothing to be impressed.
The room is as shown in the web but older. No toothbrush. The buffet is ok.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for taking the time to give us your feedback. We are sorry that your impression of us was not exceeding the expectations. We will try to improve our service and facility and hoping to make your next visit happier. 
We are looking forward to welcoming you again in near future. 
Yours sincerely
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Not for the price
sample_comments.text:
Stayed in Sorakan, the new building, but the hotel did not seem to be prepared for providing proper service. 
Too crowded, the staff are eager to help but not trained, most of them were not able to communicate in English. 
It was my second stay in Suginoi, earlier in the old main building and it was definitely better than this time. 
Suginoi has changed in a very negative direction: bigger in size, less in quality.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for taking the time to give us your feedback. We are sorry that your impression of us was not exceeding the expectations. We will try to improve our service and facility and hoping to make your next visit happier. 
We are looking forward to welcoming you again in near future. 
Yours sincerely
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Good service
sample_comments.text:
The shuttle bus is available between the hotel and car park. 
For the dinner, need for queueing and the staff will take care of English speaking person. 
The bowling games is free and just pay for the shoes rental fee. 
The hotel room is clean, comfortable and big.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kin,
Thank you very much for your kind review of "Good service" to the Suginoi Hotel in Beppu! 
We are looking forward to welcoming you again soon!
Kind Regards
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Can be better
sample_comments.text: I had expected something more however, the experience turn out to be a little disappointing. Firstly, the charges for the stay was by head. We had to pay additional even though they are for 2 kids. It was not the easiest way up the hill to the hotel and lastly, the house keeper had mistaken my sons pillow to be part of the tatami and took it away. We never seen the pillow again.
sample_comments.positives: The hot spring and wonderful lighting decoration

sample_comments.title: Blanket causes serious itchiness at night
sample_comments.text: Overal it's very good. But one of the travellers experienced serious itchiness because of the blanket in the Japanse style room. Not because of the cloth but because of some mites. The reaction from the hotel was more shocking. It's like, "Here's the medicine. Don't forget to return it when checking out." This one horrible experience ruined almost perfect trip to this hotel which has so many merits.
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful scenery from the spas. Cleanness of the spas. Equipped with many convenient facilities.

sample_comments.title: Great location
sample_comments.text: Hotel room is a little old. The rooftop spa is awesome and the light show is quite good. The View from the spa overlooking the city is also breath taking. Overall a great place or spa or onsen. Buffet dinner is good with wide selections, although quality could be improved.
sample_comments.positives: Great roof top spa

sample_comments.title: Ripped off
sample_comments.text:
The cost of this hotel at over £400 a night was just ludicrous, for the room facilities especially. 
Clearly cashing in on the Rugby World Cup but even when compared to other hotels i stayed in across major cities more than £150 a night would have been too much. 
Worse hotel I stayed in on my stay in Japan by some margin.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for your kind review and choosing the Suginoi Hotel in Beppu! 
We are sorry for the situation and for not exceeding your expectations.
For your information, your room type is a Japanese and Western style room 54sqm. This room is usually used by 4 to 5 people in 1 room with Japanese family guests including dinner and breakfast, hot springs, swimming pools, even the fountain show inside The Aqua Garden at night . 
That is why, may be your price for only 1 person in the same room might been feel like a little ludicrous.
We are sorry for the situation and I feel this is totally culturally different issue.
But you have no idea about this price means.
I wish you could enjoy our hotel more during your stay.
Sincerely yours
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: Good
sample_comments.response:
この度は別府温泉 杉乃井ホテルをご利用いただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。
また、お忙しい中、クチコミをご投稿いただきましたこと、重ねて御礼申し上げます。
頂戴いたしましたコメントからは、総じてご満足いただけたようでございますが、低い評価点である事を真摯に受け止め、今後もお客様満足度の向上に努めて参る所存でございます。
これからも心を込めておもてなしをさせていただきますので、是非また当ホテルをご利用くださいますようお願い申し上げます。
次回のご来館を心よりお待ちいたしております。ありがとうございました。

sample_comments.title: Aged but good resort hotel
sample_comments.text: Huge hotel, famous with the locals in Kyushu. Pool closes at 10 pm! Kids will love it there.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for staying with us and your kind review.
We will keep striving to improve our service and facilities.
We are looking forward to welcoming you again soon.

Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel !
sample_comments.text: Hotel provide free shuttle bus between Beppu station and the hotel. Hotel include three building and it would be much better to stay in Hanna Building as it was much new and the open onsen bath was in Hanna Building . Buffet breakfast with a lot of food choice and taste good, and the dinner buffet I would say just so so.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for your kind review. 
It is nice to know you like our HANA building during your stay.　We are continually trying to improve the variety and quality of our facilities, menu and services. 
We are looking forward to having you again in near future.
Sincerely yours
Suginoi Hotel.

sample_comments.title: Ocean view is disappointed
sample_comments.text: Too much group staying, too busy
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kee,
Thank you very much for choosing the Suginoi Hotel in Beppu and taking your time for a kind review! 
We are sorry to hear our hotel was not exceeding your expectation.
We do not have many big groups usually, but we are fully booked every day for the past few years.
Many of our guests are families with 5 to 6 people in 1 room.
Just for your information, we have some private hot spring bath and some private room for the Japanese restaurant with an additional charge. 
Sincerely yours
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: big public onsen
sample_comments.text:
many facilities for kids; aqua park, sauna and so on;
aqua park named aqua beat close about 6pm, free for customer.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jaehoon sama,

Thank you very much for staying at the Suginoi Hotel and taking your time to write a kind review!
We are happy to know you enjoyed our aqua park with your kinds.
For your information ACQUABEAT was only for until 28OCT facility, we are closed now until next summer.
We do not know when we will open the ACQUABEAT in 2019 at this moment yet.
We are looking forward to welcoming you again!

Kind Regards
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Not bad
sample_comments.text: Have Shuttle bus, and the spring is good

sample_comments.title: Great!
sample_comments.positives: Very big hotel with all the amenities. Good breakfast. parking is close and they have transportation to and from there. Also offer a bus into town and to the railway station.
sample_comments.negatives: A bit off the center on a hill.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel with good food
sample_comments.text: Very big hotel with different hot spring, this is the reason need to go, room are huge, just stay there all day relax.
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: Despite I have booked a room for 3 adult and two children through agoda. The hotel charged extra
sample_comments.text: About 15000y for my children aged 5 for two night. Would either agoda or the hotel make it clearer on additional charges for booking?

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel in the mountains
sample_comments.positives: Amazing onsen and pool! The food is also very good. There's a lot to do at the hotel - an arcade, shopping, kiss fish foot bath, bowling, etc!
sample_comments.negatives: It's a bit far from town, but the shuttle was great for getting to the station. The pillows were not comfortable and my back hurt from the bed.

sample_comments.title: An expensive stay
sample_comments.text: Many local & overseas travellers. Packed with people everywhere, including places for buffet breakfast and dinner, hotbath, ... etc

It is a little bit dated and the bathrooms could use some renovation, but the Aqua Park and Japanese onsen more than made up for it. There are very few Europeans there, but it is entirely manageable thanks to the courtesy of the staff and the good organization.

sample_comments.title: Fabulous stay
sample_comments.text:
Stayed in the Hoshikan ocean-view room and absolutely loved it. The view from the room was picturesque.. The buffet dinner was a highlight --- great variety and it even came with free-flow wine, sake, and beer. Food quality was fantastic. Breakfast was good too. 
The onsen was very good, though it's located in another building. You can use the onsen at the Sorakan building, which is just a few minutes' indoor walk away, or take the free shuttle if you prefer.
Overall, a wonderfully relaxing stay. Would definitely return again.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us and for sharing such a wonderful review.
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your ocean-view room in Hoshikan and that the scenic view made your stay even more memorable. It is also wonderful to know that our buffet dinner---with its wide variety of dishes and free-flow wine, sake, and beer---was a highlight for you, and that you were equally pleased with breakfast.
We're glad the onsen facilities met your expectations as well. As you mentioned, Hoshikan guests are welcome to use the Sorakan onsen, and we are happy to hear that the short indoor walk and shuttle service made it convenient for you.
Thank you again for your kind words. We are truly pleased that your stay was relaxing and enjoyable, and we would be honored to welcome you back on your next visit.
sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Large hotel with lots of facilities
sample_comments.text:
We stayed in Sora Kan, which gave us access to the onsen on the top floor. It was much less crowded compared to the onsen in the main building. 

Apart from the onsens, there are lots of facilities in the hotel, including a game arcade, water park, and numerous activities to join. It could get very crowded in the evening though. 

We had buffet dinner in our building, which included a large variety of food and free alcohol. 

We added our pre-schooler after booking a double room and was charged a hefty sum (for meals and room sharing only without any extra bed). Other hotels we have stayed with usually just charge for the meals so I think their pricing is not very child-friendly.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Beppu Onsen Suginoi Hotel, and for taking the time to share your feedback with us.
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay in the Sora-kan building and had a pleasant experience at the top-floor onsen. We are also pleased that you appreciated the variety of facilities and the buffet dinner.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the crowding during the evening hours, and we will continue to look for ways to improve this.
Regarding your child's accommodation, thank you for your valuable feedback. As you stayed in a twin room with a maximum occupancy of two guests, we were unable to provide an additional bed, and your child was accommodated by sharing the existing bedding. At our hotel, children aged 3 and above are subject to additional charges, which include meals and access to our facilities. We understand that this may not have met your expectations, and we will take your comments into consideration for future improvements.
We appr
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Terrace and Dining Sora - Sora Kan Standard Twin with Mountain View 26 sqm

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel, a bit far from center, many facilities, expensive

Overall great stay, great buffet we love it. Expensive, a bit far fom center. Many great facilities for families to play and hang around. But room is expensive for the location of the hotel. 

Great for family. Many facilities and fun places.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for choosing Beppu Onsen Suginoi Hotel. We would also like to sincerely thank you for taking the time to share your review.
We are very pleased to hear that you had an overall great stay with us. It is wonderful to know that you enjoyed our buffet and that your family had a great time using our facilities and entertainment areas.
We also appreciate your valuable feedback regarding our location and room rates. Our hotel is located on a hill overlooking Beppu Bay, and we strive to provide a unique resort experience through our views, hot springs, and on-site facilities. Your comments are very important to us and will be shared internally for future improvements.
We will continue working to provide enjoyable and comfortable experiences for families, and we sincerely hope to welcome you again in the future.

sample_comments.title: Star Pavilion Accommodation
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at the Hoshikan for the first time as a family of four.

Check-in and check-out were easy with the machines, and the process was very smooth. The Suginoi Palace is not far from the Hoshikan, and you can get there in about five minutes using the connecting passage. However, since it is up a hill, there are many escalator and elevator transfers. The Hoshikan has a theme of Japanese style, with shoji-like doors at the front desk and in the rooms, creating a calm atmosphere. 

The highly anticipated Hoshikan buffet dinner featured seafood such as roasted straw, sashimi, and sushi, as well as Japanese dishes like rice cooked in a hay pot and tempura, with a bit of Chinese and French food as well. In particular, the fresh sashimi and the tender roasted beef cooked with straw were exquisite! For dessert, the soft serve ice cream and pudding recommended by the chef were indeed rich and delicious. There were also Japanese-style sweets like mizu yokan and mizumochi. 

Breakfast was also centered around Japanese cuisine, with sashimi, grilled fish, yuba shabu, and rice flour galettes, all of which were delicious. There was a good selection of fruits as well. However, it was truly disappointing that the mochi I was looking forward to was not available.

The bath was at the Suginoi Palace's Tanayu, where you can get a great view of Beppu from a high location, and it was quite satisfying. There are also private tubs with flowing hot spring water, providing a luxurious experience. The dressing room has staff on duty, and they offer towels as well as small amenities like hair ties and hair caps. However, please note that the Tanayu can get crowded during certain times.

Considering the variety and luxury of the meals and how crowded the baths can be, I personally find the Chukan to be the most satisfying overall. In terms of convenience for getting around, the Nijikan, which is just a matter of stepping outside and crossing the street, is the closest and most convenient.

Additionally, Aqua Beat will open around the end of May, and it is attractive that staying guests can use it for free. It had water slides, waves, and a lazy river, which were fun. However, since there is only a play pool, I recommend that those who want to swim go to the Suginoi Palace pool.
sample_comments.response:
この度はご家族皆さまで杉乃井ホテル 星館をご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
また、詳細で温かみのあるご感想をお寄せいただき、重ねて御礼申し上げます。

チェックイン・チェックアウトのスムーズさや、館内移動の印象、そして星館ならではの和の雰囲気を心地よくお感じいただけたようで、何よりでございます。
また、ビュッフェに関しても藁焼きやお刺身、デザートなどを高くご評価くださり、大変光栄です。特にディナー・モーニングそれぞれに具体的なお言葉を頂戴し、調理スタッフも大変励みになります。

一方で、楽しみにされていた「お餅」がご用意できていなかった件につきましては、誠に申し訳ございませんでした。いただいたお声は、今後のメニュー検討の際にしっかりと参考にさせていただきます。

棚湯やアクアビートのご利用についても、混雑状況やご利用者様のニーズに即したご感想を頂戴し、ありがとうございます。館内移動のしやすさやそれぞれの館の特徴についてのご意見も、宿選びを検討されるお客様にとって貴重な情報となるかと存じます。

ぜひ次回は、異なるお部屋タイプや季節に応じた魅力もお楽しみいただけましたら幸いです。
またのご来館をスタッフ一同、心よりお待ち申し上げております。

sample_comments.title: Come for the Outdoor Hilltop Onsens
sample_comments.text: The Suginoi Hotel is a very unique place. The hotel reminded me of a Las Vegas hotel without the casino. There are water and laser light shows, an arcade full of games, a bowling alley and tons of people, especially children. If you are looking for an intimate getaway, this is not your hotel. The room was very old and outdated but had a huge window with a great city and ocean view. The dinner buffet was disappointing for the food choices but the breakfast buffet was better. Both buffets were packed like a Las Vegas buffet. One night, we upgraded to the Japanese restaurant for only about $5 per person which was worth the price. Good food and very quiet and peaceful. The shining star on the hill was the onsens (hot springs) especially at night. Imagine yourself naked, in warm hot springs water with a slight ocean breeze overlooking the ocean and city lights. This experience felt like a dream. You could stay elsewhere and just pay to use the onsens.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for taking time to write a review.
We are so glad to know you enjoyed our Japanese Kaiseki dinner and shining star at our hot spring. Since our hotel is huge, our buffet restaurant can be very crowded. So we have a Japanese sestaurant and Italian restaurant to upgrade your dinner with a bit additional charge. I am happy you had enjoyed this. Just for your information, we are going to build 2 new wings and re-build HANA wing in 6 years plan.
We are looking forward to welcoming you again in neat future.
Sincerely yours
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: Resort style hotel
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is very big with 3 main buildings and the onsen is awesome. Can soak everyday and there's 2 onsen with one infinity pool. Is very children friendly as they provide children slippers and Yukata too. 

The Buffet breakfast and dinner selection is good too. There's indoor heated infinity swimming pool , playground style water pool called the Aqua Garden which are free of charge. There's also aqua laser and water show at night. Besides there's bowling Centre, gym, massage, game arcardes that need to pay. 

The room is good and spacious. We had the western bed with Japanese resting area. 

The staff are friendly and helpful. 

 A thing I don't like is the gym, we need to pay. Usually gym come free with hotel stay. And also initially for my room, the toilet kind of smell cause of the piping maybe, not very strong smell. But after the staff spray the toilet, the smell is fine.

Overall the stay is very enjoyable and the children definitely love it.

sample_comments.positives: The hotel has a unique open-air hot spring pool (Aqua Garden) that guests can enjoy hot spring water in their swimsuits with their friends and families. sample_comments.title: Decent price for all the facility anemities in town.
sample_comments.positives: In the past, we've stayed at Beppu Suginoi most of the time. We enjoy the infinity hot springs, varieties of all you can eat food services (breakfast and dinner included), and great view of Beppu bay and city. They added an hour limit on all you can drink alcoholic, even though we don't consume that much alcohol. There are other fun stuff to do at the facility such as outdoor pool, Game Center, and bowling alley which is great for kids to have fun.
sample_comments.negatives: The newly built hotel we stayed in recently are not as roomy (with tatami floor) and Japanese traditional feel as it was before. The bathroom is a bit small, compared to the past rooms. We felt like staying in typical, modern hotel environment. The cost does not include using the hot springs bath, which is 250 yen per day, per person (which is only about 1/10 of what it'll cost for non-hotel guests.

sample_comments.title: Fantastic hotel
sample_comments.text: The best hotel I've ever been. If you are looking for a nice place in Oita, this one is the best one you can find. The onsen inside the hotel is very huge and with different types of baths. Try to visit it during the night, you can see the stars while you're taking a relaxing bath. The buffet restaurant is a little bit expensive but the food is excellent. You are allowed to walk inside the hotel installations with a yukata on. Visit also the pools. The hotel is wonderful!
sample_comments.positives: The rooms are very big and the views from the windows are splendid. The pools and the onsen are wonderful.
sample_comments.negatives: Just a little bit way of the city. The buses are useful but the stops near the hotel are not easy to find.

sample_comments.title: Modern onsen experience at Beppu
sample_comments.positives:
- A true 4 star hotel that is modern, beautiful view of the bay
- Roof top features a panoramic onsen with indoor and outdoor experience
- There is two outdoor onsen to choose from (Tana yu & Sora yu) - they are in different buildings. Staying guests are entitle for free unlimited access to both. It felt surreal in the cold 4-6C evening of Spring. I could see smoke rising from the bath waters.
- Excellent wifi
- The Sora Kan buffet (breakfast and dinner) was a good choice of food featuring Haagen Dazs ice cream, chinese, westen and japanese cuisine
- There is a arcade and bowling center (paid)
- Free shuttle service for guests complimentary from the Beppu station (did not use)
- Excellent view of the mountain, very quite and relaxing environment to unwind
- There was a staff that speak Cantonese, a Nepalese waiter, belle girl/boy looks like there is diversity in the staff - perhaps the company suggesting has a good EDI policy.
- Room supplied Yukata for Onsen, lots of size to choose from
- The reception hall has lots of vending machines and very well decorated/modern feel
- NIght show available for kids, projection shows/events
- Outdoor pool (heated) available for guests, open until quite late when we stayed there
- Lots of locker in pool and onsen
- The hotel feature a LIVE headcounts estimate of how crowded each of its facility. Like, it will tell you that it may be croweded in the Women Sora-yu but little crowd in the Male Sora-yu onsen. These LIVE headcounts are projected on the TV of your room, or in big LCD TV in the reception hall. This informs how busy and crowded each facilities are. I think that is pretty cool.
- Quick check-out experience. Seamless check-in.
- Ample of free parking - managed by the Hotel in close vicinity. We parked in P3, which is a parking building with roof cover.
sample_comments.negatives:
Nothing in particular but things to keep in mind
- Open air onsens is truely an outdoor experience - so it feels like people can see you.
- The arcade game and bowling is not free, it is a paid per use service
- Although the buffet has a lot of choice, I wouldn't eat it more than 2 nights. It is delicious for a first time stay - I could see myself getting tired of eating the same thing several days. Basically the menu is recycled - at least for my 2 night stay in March 2025.
- You need to take ticket and queue to be allowed into the dining hall. This contrast with other hotel that I have stayed where you are given a ticket allocated with a time slot i.e. an appointment. There is pro and con to Beppu Suginoi system, the con is that there is waiting, up to 15 min. It didn't felt long at all. Just be prepare to wait. The pro is that anyone can just rock up and have a table. Under any situation, you are allocated 100 min of eating time, in which afterward, based on self-discipline, you need to vacate your table. Your table will be marked with the time you started to remind you of this.
- The Sora-kan entrance can be easily missed for those that has never been or don't know where it is located. We missed the entrance and drove right past it. The traffic controller - working for the Hotel were not particularly helpful as we didn't speak Japanese and they did not understand English.

sample_comments.title: Perfectly adequate Japanese resort hotel
sample_comments.text: A farily typical Japanese hotel with extensive facilities (which I didn't use as I was there for a brief business trip.) The rooms are typically small but perfectly comfortable. Wired interenet available at no extra cost (you have to ask for a cable at the front desk.) The hotel is on a hillside so walking to Beppu not easy. Hordes of Japanese families are there using the "Onsen" (hot tubs). Typically excellent Japanese service. I didn't eat at the hotel at all.
sample_comments.positives: View, facilities
sample_comments.negatives: Somewhat isolated location

sample_comments.title: If you stay at Sora Kan, suggest to book half board at Terrace restaurant. It is in the same building
sample_comments.positives: Great facilities

sample_comments.title: Buffet was very satisfying.
sample_comments.text: I stayed at the Rainbow Hotel. The guest room was reasonably spacious, clean, and comfortable. In particular, the buffet with free alcohol was very satisfying. However, there were no large public baths or restaurants at the Rainbow Hotel, so I had to go to the Star Hotel, which was a bit of a hassle. Overall, though, I think it's a hotel with good cost performance.

sample_comments.title: Sora Kan and Caeda Dining
sample_comments.text: Stayed here for a night and when you arrive you can feel the luxury. Lobby, entrance, outdoor space is beautiful. The room has a good view on the 6th floor. Caeda dining was good but a good five minute walk away (which is good if you're going to the hot spring Tanayu before or afterwards), but, would have preferred the sora Kan dining instead. Overall great place. Only surprise was the water, I asked for a water bottle at the check in counter and they would have charged me for it. Not a big deal, but surprised given the price we are paying for the hotel stay.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for choosing to stay at Beppu Onsen Suginoi Hotel.
We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to share such detailed feedback regarding your stay.

We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the atmosphere of our hotel and the beautiful views upon arrival.
We would also like to express our apologies for the inconvenience caused by the distance to the Caeda Dining area.
In addition, we are sorry to have surprised you regarding the bottled water at check-in, as we were unable to meet your expectations on this matter.

Please be assured that we take your valuable comments seriously and will use them to improve our services moving forward.
We look forward to welcoming you again in the future, and we will continue striving to provide a more comfortable and pleasant stay for you.

Thank you once again, and we hope to have the opportunity to serve you again soon.

We were on the third floor of Sorakan, and as soon as we entered, there was a strange sewer smell. I thought "What is this?" at first, but it kind of smelled like hot springs~ Since my mindset is very positive, I didn't ask to change rooms. ^^

sample_comments.title: Good experience except for the Italian restaurant
sample_comments.text:
The Japanese style room was clean, spacious and well-appointed, the toilet looked old because of the cool white fluorescent lighting, but otherwise we had good experiences with the onsens and aqua garden. Good place for families with arcade, aqua garden and wave pool to keep the kids occupied. Both buffet restaurants had a good selection of food, in particular the Caeda Palace, however these 2 restaurants do not open for lunch, so dining options for lunch are limited.

We tried the Italian restaurant, food was alright, but we were made to wait outside even though there were empty tables. The waitress kept ushering us out of the restaurant to the back entrance, gave us the menu and asked us to place our orders first before we could sit down at a table and make ourselves comfortable. She said she needed to prepare the table, but this should be done before guests arrive, not after. It felt like an odd practice and runs contrary to what most restaurants do.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Yilling sama,
Thank you very much for taking your time for writing a review.
We are sorry that you had bad experience at our Italian restaurant. We shared this information with our management levels and relative department to fix the problem and improve the customer service at the restaurant.
We are sorry again about it.
Sincerely yours
Suigoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: recommend

if i hv to pick one or two things to critique, the bathroom n toilet in rooms are too old, which i believe were not replaced together during removation. 
another thing is the reception staff of the buffet restaurant, the men were rude and impolite to chinese looking tourists. very obvious.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Christy sama,

Thank you for your comments recommended. However, I apologize for the problems that you encountered during your last stay. This is not the type of review that we like to see, and we will make sure to improve our customer service to prevent such an incident never occur again.

Regarding to the toilet, as you mentioned, we have renovated part of the toilet once. I appreciate if we could get your kind understanding as the renovation style was the best choice for us at that time. Thank you for staying with us, and we look forward to another chance to serve you.

Best Regards,
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.positives: Buffet had an amazing selection.

sample_comments.title: It's tough for the elderly.
sample_comments.text:
I stayed at the Seikan Inn. I have always wanted to stay at Suginoi Hotel someday, and while the system and room facilities (check-out procedures in the room, ability to watch YouTube on TV), meals (with all-you-can-drink options and a variety of desserts) were excellent, the bath was far for elderly guests. Additionally, since the changing room for the pool was combined with the bath area, there were many small children creating a commotion, and the entrance had soaking wet mats, which made enjoying the Beppu hot springs difficult. 

Furthermore, the hotel's distance from the multi-story parking garage also resulted in longer check-in times, which was a downside (there was also a wait for the shuttle bus from the multi-story parking lot). It would be nice to have a souvenir shop near the front desk. The fact that there was Japanese sake (Dassai from Yamaguchi Prefecture) included in the all-you-can-drink options was fantastic! I drank too much! There was no wait for the elevator, a water server in the room, towels provided every time at the bath entrance, and an ice server, which were all amazing!
sample_comments.response:
この度は杉乃井ホテルにご宿泊くださいまして、誠にありがとうございます。
また、「いつかは泊まってみたい」と思ってくださっていた中でお越しいただけたこと、心より御礼申し上げます。
お部屋の設備やチェックアウトの仕組み、飲み放題付きのお食事、デザートの豊富さ、日本酒（獺祭）までご満足いただけたとのこと、大変うれしく拝見いたしました。
館内のウォーターサーバーやタオル設置、氷サーバーなども快適にお使いいただけたご様子で何よりでございます。
一方で、棚湯までのご移動距離や、更衣室がアクアガーデンと共用である点により、落ち着いてご利用いただけなかったこと、誠に申し訳ございませんでした。
特にご高齢のお客様にとってご負担となってしまったことは、私どもとしても心苦しく、真摯に受け止めております。
また、入口に敷いておりましたマットの状態につきましても、行き届かずご不快な思いをおかけしましたことをお詫び申し上げます。
駐車場からホテルまでのご移動やシャトルバスの待ち時間、売店の場所につきましても貴重なご意見をありがとうございます。いただいたお声は、今後の運営やご案内方法の改善に活かしてまいります。
ご不便をおかけした点がありながらも、「最高でした」と感じていただけた部分があったことは、私どもにとって大きな励みでございます。
次回はより快適にお過ごしいただけるよう努めてまいりますので、また機会がございましたらぜひお越しくださいませ。
心よりお待ちしております。

Thank you very much for choosing Beppu Onsen Suginoi Hotel.
We also sincerely appreciate you taking the time to share your detailed review.
We are delighted to hear that you and your family enjoyed your stay at Sora Kan, including the onsen, the beautiful ocean and town views, as well as our breakfast and dinner buffet offerings. Your kind comments mean a great deal to us.
On the other hand, we sincerely apologize if the service at the gym did not meet your expectations. Your feedback has been shared with the relevant department, and we will work to improve our hospitality standards to ensure a more comfortable experience for all guests.
We truly hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you and your family again in the future and providing an even more enjoyable stay.

sample_comments.title: We enjoy everyone
sample_comments.positives: Its good

sample_comments.title: The space pavilion is comfortable!
sample_comments.text:
I stayed for 2 nights and 3 days. Even though it was a weekday, many people were staying, and I realized it is a popular accommodation!

Since there are many guests, the shelf bath and bowling alley can get crowded at times, especially with families, but the Chuukan accommodation-exclusive Chuuyuu was calm, empty, and comfortable no matter when I used it! The all-you-can-drink alcohol during dinner buffet was also excellent! The food was delicious.

The only downside was that the parking lot for the Chuukan was always full because it is very popular, and I had to use a parking lot that required a shuttle bus to get to.

The meals were served in a buffet style. It gets crowded, but if you go early, you can be guided to a seat with a nice view. The baths require using elevators, escalators, and connecting walkways to get to. It's nice in the summer, but it can be extremely cold in the winter, so I recommend dressing warmly. Overall, I am satisfied. There are many services for small children, and I saw many families visiting. I think everyone can enjoy it together.

sample_comments.title: The children were overjoyed.
sample_comments.text: This time, I used it for my parents' 70th birthday celebration. The staff's response during check-in was very good, and it was a pleasant experience, but perhaps they were not Japanese, as there were moments when I couldn't understand what they were saying. The room was larger and cleaner than I expected, which was great. However, the balcony area was too wide, making the view a bit hard to see. It was a group trip, so we booked three rooms, but I thought it would be nice if they had single rooms available at Suikan, as the rates for one person and two people staying were almost the same. Immediately after check-in, I went to the Sora-yu (sky bath). There were few people, so I was able to relax and enjoy it. The view was also nice. For dinner, since my child loves pizza, we chose Cedar Palace, but my parents complained about the long distance from Suikan to the restaurant. The escalator going up was appreciated, but I thought it would be helpful to have one going down as well. There might have been an elevator, but I couldn't find it. The food was delicious, and the all-you-can-drink alcohol was the best. The next morning, I used the Tana-yu (shelf bath) early and was surprised by the number of guests. There were many foreigners, and there was a note asking not to occupy spaces in the washing area, but perhaps due to not being able to read it, various items were left behind. When I thought there was nothing and sat down, towels were placed above, and I was told to move them in another language by their owner, which made me feel a little uncomfortable. The baths had various types, which was nice. The kids' area was in a private state, and my child was very excited. Even though only one person was using it, the staff kept an eye on things, and the cleaning was thorough, which I thought was wonderful. I personally had a very enjoyable experience.
sample_comments.response:

今後このようなことのないよう、日々のチェックを徹底してまいります。
また別府へお越しの機会がございましたら、是非当ホテルをご利用くださいますようお願い申し上げます。

sample_comments.title: A sprawling hotel!
sample_comments.text:
We checked in after 6 pm. and only a couple of vacant lots at the car park were found. The checking-in process was swift . 

Our stay did not include dinner. When we asked reception for the nearest restaurant for dinner, we were told to take the hotel shuttle to town and we would have to take a cab back as the shuttle would have stopped servicing by the time we finished dinner. fortunately there is a small 7-11 in the vicinity. So we resorted to having bread and instant noodles on our first night in Japan in our room!

We were out most of the time so we did not explore the sprawling hotel which consisted of a few buildings. But the youngsters who used the Onsen loved it.
The breakfast spread, both local and western was sumptuous.
I liked my clean and comfortable room but one flaw, the hotel does not provide shower caps. Front desk told me to look for one at the Onsen but none was found. 
On hindsight, I should have spent some time exploring and enjoying the hotel facilities.

Although it seems that you were generally satisfied with the evaluations we received, we apologize for any inconvenience caused.

If you have the opportunity to come to Beppu again, we hope that you will enjoy your stay at our hotel.
We will continue to serve you with all our heart, so please use our hotel again.
We look forward to your next visit. thank you very much.

The food reflected the unique tidiness of Japanese cuisine, and the view from the window of the accommodation was beautiful. The hot spring could be used without any waiting.

sample_comments.title: Best upscale stay in Beppu (Sorakan)
sample_comments.positives: Everything about the stay was comfortable. Once you're inside the resort, you dont have to worry about anything: Food is taken care of. Onsen is taken care of (yukata/ all bath products and towels provided at the onsen/ literally just need to bring undergarments and some cash because you want to quench ur thirst after onsen). I didnt want to leave the hotel and just onsen 2x a day The highlight is Tanayu, the main onsen with AMAZING ocean views and just fresh air while bathing outdoors! (I did stay in Sorakan/ had access to Sorayu - good quieter alternative/ great outdoor tub with surround ocean views/ but Tanayu just has a place in my heart) Few times I did want to leave the hotel - i just went down to lobby and asked them to call a taxi - yes, there is a free shuttle to/from Beppu station but sometimes you're in a hurry or just lazy. (Keep in mind, transportation/ taxi costs ARE very expensive in Japan.) Was under 2000 yen to closeby places like don quixote (on the way back, short 10 min walk to beppu station & took shuttle back).
sample_comments.negatives: Property itself has many buildings & is huge. Its also situated on a hill, so ur best bet - take free shuttle from Beppu station to hotel and vice versa. Sometimes the shuttle times wont match with your schedule - just take the taxi to beppu kitahama (bus terminal for mostly outer cities/ local buses go to beppu station west). No constraint on time - you can take free shuttle to beppu station/ take JR or local buses from eki nishiguchi (station west exit) OR walk 10-15 min to bus terminal (kitahama) from beppu station.

if I travel with family (especially with kids) I will stay here again. It is definitely kid-friendly.

Buffet options - nothing to complaint , quality was higher than I had expected for buffet . cooking stations were mastered by delicated chef. 

Amazing view which is unbeatable yet it was just too noisy to enjoy the quiet onsen time. 

It has separated into 2 parts - 1st part all-genders pool( aqua city) which I did expect to be in festive atmosphere. more like a pool area , prepare swimwear , allow fotos. 2nd part- gender-restricted onsen (little bit better but not as quiet as any other onsen I had been to). I am sorry but don't mean to offense, during my time (Thursday night) it was packed with Korean family , kids just need extra effort to control.
