이번에는 벳푸 온천 스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
또한 바쁘신 가운데 소중한 후기를 남겨 주신 점 깊이 감사드립니다.
가족 여행에 적합한 호텔이라고 평가해 주셔서 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다.
이번에 투숙하신 호시관에서도 편안하게 지내셨다니 안심이 됩니다. 또한 온천, 식사, 쇼핑 등 다양한 시설을 한 곳에서 즐길 수 있는 리조트라는 점을 좋게 평가해 주셔서 직원 일동 큰 보람을 느끼고 있습니다.
앞으로도 모든 세대의 고객님께서 호텔 내에서 즐겁고 편안한 시간을 보내실 수 있도록 더욱 노력하겠습니다.
다시 가족 여러분을 모실 수 있는 날을 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.
sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.title: I would like you to aim for the best, so here is a frank comment.
sample_comments.text:
(Good Points)
The food was excellent.
The hot springs were the best.
The view was stunning.
The bed was great.
It is only a 15-minute taxi ride to the Hell Valley, and we were able to arrive before getting stuck in traffic.

(Things to Improve)
The toilet makes a very loud noise when flushed, which can wake up other family members. It's hard to sleep when there are elderly family members who need to use the bathroom frequently.
There is not enough space to cool off after using the public bath before returning to the room.

If there were discounts for extended stays, I would definitely consider staying longer.
sample_comments.response:
このたびは杉乃井ホテルにご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
また、「最高を目指して」との思いを込めた率直で丁寧なご感想をお寄せいただき、心より御礼申し上げます。
お料理・温泉・景色・ベッドにつきまして「最高」とのお言葉を頂戴し、大変光栄に存じます。立地面においても、観光の拠点として快適にご利用いただけたご様子がうかがえ、私どもにとって何よりの喜びです。
一方で、客室トイレの流水音につきましては、ご家族様のご休息を妨げてしまい、誠に申し訳ございませんでした。特に高齢のご同行者様がいらっしゃる中でのご滞在において、このようなご不便をおかけしましたことを重く受け止めております。設備面の課題として、今後の改修・改善検討の重要なご意見として共有いたします。
また、大浴場ご利用後の湯冷ましスペースが十分でなかった点につきましても、貴重なご指摘をありがとうございます。快適にクールダウンし、心身ともに整えてからお戻りいただける環境づくりは大切だと認識しております。今後の動線やスペース設計の見直しの参考とさせていただきます。
温かいお言葉とともに、改善を願うお気持ちをお寄せいただき、心より感謝申し上げます。
「また来たい」と思っていただけるだけでなく、「さらに良くなった」と感じていただける宿を目指し、今後も努めてまいります。
またのお越しを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ちしております。
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Terrace and Dining Sora - Sora Kan Deluxe Room with Ocean View 46 sqm

sample_comments.title: A hot spring hotel suitable for the whole family.
sample_comments.text: We stayed in a twin room with a mountain view at the hotel this time. The room size is moderate, with a modern design, and it is very clean. There are bottled water, slippers, toothbrushes, and a hot spring bathrobe in the room, among other amenities. If the budget permits, I recommend staying in a sea view room, as the view is really beautiful. The restaurant at the hotel is large and lovely, with seats facing the sea, offering a wide range of food choices that are also very tasty. Red and white wines, beer, and soda are available for unlimited drinks, and if I remember correctly, there was even brandy and whiskey. The top floor of the hotel is the hot spring area, where the women's bath has both indoor and outdoor options; soaking in the hot spring while enjoying the sunrise and sunset is unforgettable. The staff have a great attitude and can communicate in English. The hotel features a large water park, a toy crane game room, a bowling alley, a ping pong area, a children's playground, a small souvenir shop, and a restaurant. There is also a convenience store across the street, so everything you need is available. The hotel's main building, the star building, and the large hot spring and pool in the middle are all connected by an indoor pathway, so you won't have to worry about rain. This is not a traditional hot spring hotel; the staff do not take you to your room, there is no kaiseki cuisine served in the room, and there are no welcome fruits or snacks, but Suginoi is very suitable for families. The next time we visit Beppu, we will choose this hotel again and will pay a little extra for a sea view room at the hotel.
sample_comments.response:
非常感谢您选择入住杉乃井酒店宙馆，并抽出宝贵时间分享如此详细而用心的评价。
我们很高兴得知您对宙馆的客房、整洁度与现代化设计感到满意，也感谢您对房内备品与整体舒适度的肯定。关于海景房的评价，我们也十分认同，能够将别府湾的美丽景色尽收眼底，确实是宙馆的一大魅力。
宙馆餐厅的环境、丰富的餐饮选择以及包含多种酒类的饮品服务能让您满意，我们感到非常欣慰。顶层温泉能在泡汤的同时欣赏日出与日落，这段难忘的体验正是我们希望带给每一位宾客的回忆。
同时，也感谢您提及我们员工的服务态度以及英语沟通能力，这对海外宾客而言尤为重要。酒店内完善的娱乐设施、水上乐园与丰富的公共空间，正是希望让不同年龄层的客人都能尽情享受假期。宙馆、星馆与温泉及泳池区域之间设有室内通道，即使遇到雨天也能安心移动，这一点能被您感受到，我们十分高兴。
正如您所提到的，杉乃井酒店并非传统日式温泉旅馆，而是一家以"全家都能享受"为理念的温泉度假酒店。能够得到您"非常适合一家大小"的评价，是对我们最大的肯定。
期待您下次再访别府时，能再次选择杉乃井酒店，也希望届时能为您安排心仪的海景房，在宙馆度过更加难忘的时光。
衷心期待您的再次光临。
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Terrace and Dining Sora - Sora Kan Standard Twin with Mountain View 26 sqm

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Wonderful Onsen hotel with lots of entertainment for kids and adults. Would definitely recommend it!
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for choosing Beppu Onsen Suginoi Hotel.
We also sincerely appreciate you taking the time to share your wonderful review.
We are delighted to hear that you found our hotel enjoyable for both children and adults, and that you had a great time with our onsen and entertainment facilities.
Your kind recommendation truly means a lot to all of us.
We look forward to welcoming you again and hope to provide you with another memorable stay in the future.
sample_comments.room_type: Breakfast Included at TERRAC and DINING SORA: SORA KAN Deluxe Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Suginong specializing in family travel
sample_comments.text: The hot spring, aqua pool, dinner buffet, breakfast, and room condition are all good. When entering for the first time with a rental car, I missed the entrance and had to go back. Parking is possible, but it takes time and since it's uphill, you need to take a shuttle for your luggage. It might be more convenient to drop off your luggage in hotels like Sorakan or Hoshikan before parking. The Korean staff (thank you very much to the sales representative) are very kind and helpful. I tried to eat out, but since I'm not used to the rental car, the dinner at Hoshikan and Dining was really good. I want to go back with my family. It seems like a hotel that parents and kids would like. Since it takes time to come from the parking area to Suginoi, it might be better to have dinner indoors. I could only go to Tanayu, but I think Sorayu also has its fans. I chose Hoshikan, which has been recently remodeled, and the sushi at Dining with my friend. It's also convenient to move to Tanayu. I want to go again. There was a miscommunication with the front desk staff at Hoshikan, but the Korean staff resolved everything. It was about adding a dinner reservation the same day, but I recommend making a reservation that includes dinner. I hardly drink, so I don't need the nomihoudai (all-you-can-drink), but the kabosu liqueur is delicious.
sample_comments.response:
이번에 벳푸온천 스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
또한 바쁘신 가운데 이렇게 상세하고 소중한 후기를 남겨주셔서 깊이 감사드립니다.
온천, 아쿠아풀, 식사, 객실 컨디션 등 전반적인 부분에 만족하셨다는 말씀을 듣고 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다.
가족 여행에 잘 어울리는 호텔로 느끼셨고, "또 가고 싶다"는 말씀까지 전해주셔서 직원 모두에게 큰 힘이 됩니다.
다만, 처음 방문하실 때의 진입로와 주차 이용, 그리고 프런트에서의 커뮤니케이션 부분에 있어 불편을 드린 점에 대해서는 진심으로 사과드립니다.
그럼에도 불구하고 한국인 직원들의 응대에 따뜻한 말씀을 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드리며, 주신 의견은 향후 안내 및 서비스 개선에 적극 반영하겠습니다.
또한, 호텔 내 식사 선택이나 온천 이용에 대한 실제 경험을 바탕으로 한 조언도 감사드립니다.
앞으로도 고객님의 여행 스타일에 맞는 보다 편안한 숙박을 제공할 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다.
다음 방문 시에는 소라유 등 또 다른 매력도 꼭 즐겨보시길 바랍니다.
가족분들과 함께 다시 찾아주실 날을 직원 일동 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.
sample_comments.room_type: Breakfast Included at Wa Dining Hoshi: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Mountain View

sample_comments.title: As expected of Suginoi.
sample_comments.text: My wife and I stay at Suginoi Hotel once a year. This time, we stayed at the Star Wing. The overall theme is Japanese. The lobby and the rooms are filled with Japanese elements down to the details. It was the most reasonably priced room, but it was spacious enough to relax comfortably. The sofa by the window was large and nice. We had our meals at the dining area on the 13th floor. There is an all-you-can-eat buffet with mainly Japanese and Chinese dishes. Everything was delicious, and I think it's the best among buffet-style hotels. It's frustrating that I can't eat as much as I want every time The dessert pudding was delicious. They recommended putting soft-serve ice cream on top, so I tried it. It was really good! I ended up eating two like a child. The location is also great. The night view is nice, but having breakfast while watching the sunrise is wonderful. If you prefer Western food instead of Japanese, I recommend the Sky Wing. There are Rainbow Wing, Sky Wing, and Star Wing, each with different themes that are enjoyable. The staff is very polite, so I think you can consult them if you have any problems and they will help you resolve them.
sample_comments.response:
この度も杉乃井ホテルをご利用いただき、また毎年ご夫婦でお越しいただいているとのこと、心より感謝申し上げます。
星館でのご滞在が快適であったとのお言葉、大変嬉しく拝読いたしました。和のコンセプトやお部屋の広さ、ソファの快適さなど細部までご評価いただき光栄でございます。13階ダイニングのお食事もお気に召していただき、特にプリンとソフトクリームの組み合わせをお楽しみいただけたとのこと、スタッフのおすすめが良い形で伝わったようで何よりでございます。
また、朝日を眺めながらのお食事の時間が素敵なひとときとなったとのこと、旅の思い出の一部となれたことを大変嬉しく思います。
館ごとの特色についても丁寧にご紹介いただきありがとうございました。次回のご宿泊の参考になれば幸いです。今後も安心してご滞在いただけるホテルであり続けられるよう、引き続きサービスの向上に努めてまいります。
また来年、ご夫婦でのお帰りを心よりお待ち申し上げております。いつもありがとうございます。
sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Mountain View

sample_comments.title: The food is delicious.
sample_comments.text: This time I stayed at Rainbow Pavilion, and while I was satisfied with the facilities and the room, moving to Cedar Palace for meals and the hot springs was quite difficult. Since it rained a little in between, I wished it was closer. The buffet at Cedar Palace was very delicious, and I ended up eating too much. The staff's responses were good, everyone was smiling, friendly, and wonderful.
sample_comments.response:
この度は杉乃井ホテルにご宿泊くださいまして、誠にありがとうございます。
設備やお部屋にご満足いただけたとのこと、大変嬉しく拝見いたしました。
シーダパレスでのお食事もお楽しみいただけたようで、特にバイキングの内容やスタッフの対応についてお褒めの言葉をいただき、スタッフ一同励みになります。
虹館からシーダパレスへの移動については、雨の日などご不便をおかけすることもあり、貴重なご意見として今後の運営の参考にさせていただきます。
次回ご利用の際も、快適にお過ごしいただけるよう努めてまいりますので、ぜひまた杉乃井ホテルで素敵な時間をお楽しみください。
またのお越しを心よりお待ち申し上げております。
sample_comments.room_type: NIJI KAN Casual Twin Room with Shower 4-7F

sample_comments.title: Clean Rooms and Cosy
sample_comments.text:
Nice hotel with free parking , good for families , friends and couples too . 
Room was fashionable and cosy room . There is bowling alley , darts corner , table tennis , pool for swimming. Can enjoy the day in the hotel . Free breakfast and dinner too .
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for choosing to stay at Suginoi Hotel and for sharing your wonderful review.
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our stylish and cozy rooms as well as the variety of facilities including the bowling alley, darts corner, table tennis, and swimming pool.
It's great to know that you found our hotel suitable for families, friends, and couples alike.

We are also glad that you appreciated our complimentary parking as well as the free breakfast and dinner.
Your kind words motivate us to continue improving our services and facilities.

We look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the near future.

Awesome hotel for couple or Family
All in one roof just like Genting Highland Concept ...
Best to Self drive just like us, Free and easy, Down town nothing much
Next, driving to Kumamoto ..

Thank you very much for choosing Beppu Onsen Suginoi Hotel.
We also sincerely appreciate you taking the time to post your review despite your busy schedule.

We are truly encouraged by your kind words describing our hotel as ideal for couples and families, and for offering an all-in-one facility.

sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Terrace and Dining Sora - Sora Kan Deluxe Room with Ocean View 46 sqm

sample_comments.title: Viking
sample_comments.text: This time, I stayed at the Chukan. I watched YouTube videos to prepare, but I felt that the variety of items at the buffet seemed to have decreased a bit. The eel and roast beef that I was looking forward to were not there. It might vary by day, but... nonetheless, the food was delicious. I've stayed at the Suginoi Hotel more than ten times since I was a child, and it truly impresses me. The room was also very clean and fantastic. I will use it again.
sample_comments.response:
この度は別府温泉杉乃井ホテルをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
また、幼少期から何度もご宿泊いただいております事、長年にわたるご愛顧に心より御礼申し上げます。今回のご滞在では、宙館にてごゆっくりお過ごしいただけたようで何よりでございました。
お部屋の清掃や快適さについて「最高」とのお言葉を頂戴し、大変嬉しく拝見いたしました。
一方で、バイキングのメニューに際しましては、ご期待に添えなかった点がありましたこと、誠に申し訳ございません。
メニュー内容はや季節・仕入れ状況により変更となる場合がございます。楽しみにされていたお料理をご提供できなかったこと、心苦しく存じます。
今後も、多くのお客様にご満足いただけるバイキングを目指して、品数・品質ともに工夫を重ねてまいります。
これからも「さすがだな」と感じていただけるホテルであり続けられるよう、精一杯努めてまいりますので、ぜひまたのお越しを心よりお待ちしております。
ありがとうございました。
sample_comments.room_type: SORA KAN Standard Twin Room with Mountain View and Shower

sample_comments.title: Suginoi is amazing.
sample_comments.text:
My parents asked if this is a five-star place. I went with my parents and kids, and the cleanliness is good, the facilities are well-equipped, the food is tasty, the view is nice, and the sauna and swimming pool facilities are very satisfying. During our three-day trip to Japan, we spent one night at Suginoi, and I can't imagine what it would have been like if we hadn't come here.

Especially since it was so hot to go out for dinner and the city was far away, we used the internal restaurant. We were at Sorakan, so we had dinner at Cedar Palace and breakfast at Sorakan Restaurant. The dinner was outstanding both in terms of price and variety of food, and the staff were very friendly and kid-friendly, which made it the best experience.

The breakfast also included eggs benedict, and the salad with fresh arugula was impressive. All the dairy products were very fresh and tasty. I didn't want to leave Beppu because of Suginoi.

The shuttle bus was also great!!!! Suginoi is the best!!!
sample_comments.response:
이 번 스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주시고 소중한 후기를 남겨 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
부모님과 가족분들 모두 저희 호텔에서 즐거운 시간을 보내셨다는 말씀을 읽고 매우 기뻤습니다.

청결한 객실과 편리한 시설, 아름다운 전망, 사우나와 수영장, 그리고 맛있는 식사와 친절한 직원 서비스에 만족하셨다는 칭찬은 저희 모든 직원들에게 큰 힘이 됩니다.

특히 씨다 팰리스에서의 저녁 식사와 소라칸에서의 아침 식사를 즐기시고, 키즈 프렌들리 서비스에 만족하셨다는 말씀에 깊이 감사드립니다.
또한 셔틀버스 서비스에 대한 좋은 평가도 큰 영광으로 생각합니다.

"스기노이가 있어서 벳푸를 떠나고 싶지 않았다"는 고객님의 따뜻한 말씀을 가슴에 새기며, 앞으로도 편안하고 기억에 남는 숙박을 제공하기 위해 더욱 노력하겠습니다.

가족분들과 함께 다시 스기노이 호텔을 찾아주실 날을 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.
다시 한번 진심으로 감사드립니다.
sample_comments.room_type: Breakfast Included at TERRAC and DINING SORA: SORA KAN Deluxe Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.title: A place I'd like to visit again.
sample_comments.text: I am very satisfied that I was able to spend enjoyable time with my family. Guests can use the Aqua Beat water play facilities, Aqua Garden hotel pool, and Tanayu hot spring for free. It was even better that they allowed us to use the pool and hot spring right after check-out. Both dinner and breakfast were delicious, and I especially liked the unlimited drinks during dinner. Clean bedding and friendly staff service. I would like to visit again when I travel to Beppu next time.
sample_comments.response: 스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 정말 감사합니다. 또한, 바쁘신 와중에 평가를 게시해 주셔서 거듭 감사드립니다. 앞으로도 손님 만족도 향상에 힘을 기울이겠습니다. 부디 다시 이용해 주시도록 부탁 말씀드립니다.
sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.title: I was able to experience the feeling of travel.
sample_comments.text: It was my first trip with just my mother, a girls' trip. At Cedar Palace, we chose from a variety of Japanese, Western, and Chinese foods, and everything was very delicious. The staff was attentive, offering help when we seemed to need it and quickly clearing our plates. We were looking forward to the projection mapping, and to our surprise, it was being shown not only by the pool but also outside, allowing us to enjoy it twice and have a fulfilling time. There were many families with children, but it was also a fun place for just the two of us to enjoy things like hot springs and games. I want to go again!
sample_comments.response: この度はお母様とのご旅行で杉乃井ホテルをお選びいただき、誠にありがとうございます。シーダパレスのお食事やスタッフの対応にご満足いただけたとのこと、大変嬉しく拝読いたしました。また、プロジェクションマッピングもお楽しみいただけて何よりでございます。お子様連れだけでなく、女性お二人でもゆったりと楽しい時間を過ごしていただけるホテルを目指しておりますので、ぜひまたのご来館を心よりお待ちしております。

sample_comments.title: Hôtel pour des vacances en famille
sample_comments.positives:
Hôtel très bien pour les familles. Les piscines avec les toboggans sont vraiment chouettes. 
Les buffets sont assez fournis surtout celui de SORA.
sample_comments.negatives: Onsen très beaux mais pas de spa. Chambres un peu petites pour le tarif.

sample_comments.title: 맛있게 먹고 쉬기 좋은 호텔
sample_comments.text: 뷰도 좋고 놀거리도 많아서 하루만 머물기엔 아쉬운 호텔이에요. 수영장은 큰 매력을 모르겠지만 온천들은 다 좋았어요. 테라스 조식, 석식도 모두 신선하고 다양해서 좋았어요. 체크인 시간 즈음엔 벳푸역에서 셔틀 버스 만차 되서 다음 셔틀 기다려야 한 건 불편했어요.
sample_comments.response:
고객님, 저희 스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
또한 정성스러운 후기 남겨주셔서 감사합니다.
멋진 전망과 다양한 즐길 거리, 신선하고 다양한 테라스식 아침∙저녁 식사 등 여러 면에서 만족해 주셨다니 저희도 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다.
온천에 대한 긍정적인 평가도 큰 힘이 됩니다.
한편, 벳푸역에서의 셔틀버스 이용 시 불편을 겪으신 점에 대해서는 진심으로 사과의 말씀을 드립니다. 보다 원활하게 이용하실 수 있도록 셔틀 운행 상황 및 안내 체계를 개선해 나가겠습니다.
다음에는 더 여유로운 일정으로 다시 방문해 주시면 감사하겠습니다. 고객님의 재방문을 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.

sample_comments.title: Bel hôtel.
sample_comments.positives: Emplacement au top, dominant Beppu, face à la mer. Nombreux parkings. L ' hôtel est immense, avec salle de jeux électroniques, boutiques... Magnifiques bains onsen au dernier étage. Diner et petit déjeuner buffet superbes. Clientèle familiale.
sample_comments.negatives: Vu la taille de l' établissement, s' attendre à beaucoup de monde.

sample_comments.title: Suginoi that does not disappoint expectations.
sample_comments.text: My spouse and I love hot springs, so we have visited the Suginoi Hotel in Beppu several times. This time, we stayed at Hoshikan (Seikan), which opened this year. As expected, the facility was a wonderful blend of cleanliness with traditional and modern sensibilities, and the attentive and friendly staff were more than enough to soothe the tired bodies and minds of travelers. It was a great choice to have the restaurant located on the top floor of the same building without the need to move to another one. However, the seating arrangement was long in a straight line, which made it seem like a long walk for the elderly or children if they were assigned a seat at one end and needed to go all the way to the opposite end to get their desired food. Personally, I was very satisfied with the stay.
sample_comments.response:
この度は別府温泉杉乃井ホテルをご利用いただき誠にありがとうございます。 
また、お忙しい中、クチコミをご投稿いただきました事、重ねて御礼申し上げます。

sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Séjour détente avec un magnifique onsen
sample_comments.positives:
La piscine thermale en plein air et le onsen (avec aussi des bassins en plein air, et une vue magnifique) sont vraiment très agréables !
Les choix du buffet du petit-déjeuner sont impressionnants et très bons.
sample_comments.negatives: L'hôtel est loin du centre-ville. Sans moyen de locomotion, on est coincé à l'hôtel, surtout le soir, quand il n'y a plus de navette.

sample_comments.title: If you go to Beppu, an overnight stay is a must.
sample_comments.text:
The location is a bit far from Beppu city, so accessibility isn't great, but the shuttle from Beppu Station was convenient.

At first, when I checked in, there was a strange squid smell coming from the room that made me feel uncomfortable, but I was lucky that the staff were kind enough to let me change rooms right away. However, when I went into the locker room of the bath, the same strange smell was present... It seemed like the cleaning cloths hadn't dried properly or something, so I think they need to pay more attention to cleaning.

The bath itself was really the best. Located on the mountainside, the outdoor bath offers a view of Beppu city and the sea all at once; it was a refreshing experience. Because of this outdoor bath, I would want to visit Sugino again.

The breakfast was not tasty. It seems like it could be skipped.
sample_comments.response:
이번에는 스기노이 호텔에 숙박해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
우선 체크인 시 방에서 불쾌한 냄새로 불편을 드린 점 진심으로 사과드립니다. 다행히 직원의 친절한 대응으로 방을 바로 변경하실 수 있었던 점에 안심했으나, 청소 및 점검 체계를 더욱 강화하여 이런 일이 반복되지 않도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.
또한, 온천에 대해 좋은 말씀을 해주셔서 대단히 감사합니다. 산 중턱에 위치한 노천탕에서 벳푸 시내와 바다가 보이는 멋진 경치를 즐기셨다니 저희도 매우 기쁩니다.
이 소중한 온천을 계속해서 즐기실 수 있도록, 앞으로도 최고의 서비스를 제공할 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다.
다시 한 번 방문해 주시기를 진심으로 기대하며 기다리고 있겠습니다.
sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Indispensable si vous comptez passer par Beppu !
sample_comments.positives: Un complexe "all inclusive" dont l'adresse est une référence pour les résidents japonais. Les piscines chaudes extérieures sont un plaisir partagé en famille. Les onsen, indoor et outdoor juste magnifiques. Il est possible de faire ses achats de souvenirs touristiques dans la très grande boutique, de s'adonner aux jeux d'arcade si on les apprécie et surtout de déguster les mets les plus variés dans l'immense "food court" lors des dîners et du petit déjeuner !

sample_comments.title: I really love going on family trips.
sample_comments.text: I stayed at Sorakan, and since it was recently built, it was clean and had a great view. The large public bath had a view of the ocean, and I even saw the sunrise. The meals were really excellent too. If I were to book a similar-rated hotel in Korea for this price, I think I would only be able to stay for one night, especially if meals are included. The only downside was that Beppu is in a rural area, so it takes time to get there from the airport, but everything else was great.
sample_comments.response: 스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 정말 감사합니다. 또한, 바쁘신 와중에 평가를 게시해 주셔서 거듭 감사드립니다. 앞으로도 손님 만족도 향상에 힘을 기울이겠습니다. 부디 다시 이용해 주시도록 부탁 말씀드립니다.

Zur Sicherheit der Gäste stand rund um die Uhr ein Verkehrslotse am Zebrasdtreifen, unglaublich !

Con possibilità di visitare anche le piscine o l'idromassaggio, di dedicarsi al gioco o assistere agli spettacoli di luci che consiglio. sample_comments.negatives: Tutto perfetto, nessun elemento negativo.

sample_comments.title: Recommended hotels!
sample_comments.text: This was my first time staying at the Suginoi Hotel. I was surprised by the size of the hotel. There is also an amusement pool, and many families were there. They offer rental swimsuits, and the large slides made the kids very happy, along with the rental of floaties which created a lively atmosphere. The room was very clean, and the bed was spacious enough that I could sleep comfortably. The room had a toilet with a warm water bidet and a shower room. It was helpful that we received two card keys. The meals were buffet style, and both dinner and breakfast had a wide variety of delicious options. However, the only downside was that the buildings were too large and separated, which was a bit disappointing. There was the accommodation tower and the amusement tower, which felt like they were built facing each other across a road. There were security guards, but when it rained, it seemed like my feet would get wet, and since the road had quite a bit of traffic, that made me a little uneasy. In winter, not being able to eat without going outside might be a problem. But aside from that, the food was tasty, the staff were friendly, and I thought it was a good hotel.

sample_comments.title: Enorm groot hotelcomplex met veel mogelijkheden
sample_comments.positives: Het lekkere ontbijt/diner buffet, shuttlebus naar t station, diverse onsen
sample_comments.negatives: De drukte bij t ontbijt. Je krijgt dan een nummer en moet dan wachten tot ze je halen om aan tafel te gaan.

sample_comments.title: Suginoi 3rd
sample_comments.text: It had been four years... I stayed at Sora-kan, where I could use Sora-yu since I couldn't use Tanayu. The building is new, so overall it was neat and clean. Breakfast and dinner were served on the first-floor terrace, and the menu was almost the same for both nights. There was no sushi variety for dinner on the second day, and sashimi was just served in one or two plates at the table... On the second day, it felt like there was nothing to eat. There were many options, but overall the food and dessert menu felt more upscale... Breakfast was decent. There was a separate kids' menu (fried potatoes, shrimp tempura, curry, etc.) that my child liked. The most delicious thing at dinner was the Häagen-Dazs ice cream... I was glad that the natto was still the same...^^ The room was tidy, and the bathroom was separated into a shower booth, toilet, and sink area, which was convenient when staying with a child. The yukata and amenities, along with the helpfulness of indoor and outdoor facilities, were all as good as before, but I did miss the tatami room. Although it's an ocean view, I couldn't go out on the balcony. I could only look out the glass window. Sora-yu has an open feeling which is nice, but I also missed Tanayu here. Should I have gone a month later? Haha. The Aqua Garden... Since Tanayu is under construction, the changing room was narrow and disorganized... However, it's convenient to walk to the elevator from Sora-yu through the corridor. They said it was renovated, but I couldn't really feel much difference from before. It's really nice here~ If you're with kids, it's also great for them to play. I love this place so much that I took both sets of parents on my first trip to Japan with Suginoi... but I was quite disappointed with the dinner this time. There were many places to take pictures with the kids on the Sora-kan terrace and outdoor area, and there was a large ball similar to a bouncy castle that my child really enjoyed.

sample_comments.negatives: We hebben een privé-onsen geboekt. Deze is totaal niet te vergelijken met de publieke onsen dus als je het niet erg vind om in een publieke onsen te gaan kan je dat beter laten. De publieke onsen is geweldig!

sample_comments.title: Best onsen hotel for young families
sample_comments.text:
- Location not convenient but mostly mitigated by the availability of shuttle service, which needs to be more frequent between them and Beppu station.
- Wonderful facilities especially for young families.
- Food was nice and wide variety of selection ( though no variation day by day).
- I wish the guests could enjoy all onsen (for now sora kan onsen cannot be used by other guests)
- I am not a fan of noisy kids ( and there were many at this hotel). It is their main clientele so not complaining about it, just for awareness.

sample_comments.title: Heerlijk relaxte tijd
sample_comments.positives: De baden. Het eten.

sample_comments.title: It's very good for the price.
sample_comments.text:
I wasn't planning to visit a large resort while in Japan since I usually go to other vacation spots. However, after searching for Beppu, I kept coming across mentions of Suginoi, so I decided to stay there for one night, and now I understand why everyone talks about Suginoi. The dining and onsen pool are fantastic for the price! A ryokan in Japan at this price is incredibly cheap. 

The downside is that it feels too much like a large resort, which makes me feel like the purpose of visiting Japan is being lost, and the facilities or rooms are a bit old (though they are clean). Most notably, the check-in line was terrifyingly long! 

On the plus side, the highly acclaimed buffet! The sushi and steak were great! Even for someone like me who doesn't particularly enjoy sushi, it was impressive and delicious! Other buffet dishes were not that great, though. The breakfast was very good with an abundance of side dishes~ The taste of the breakfast sides was just so-so, but the coffee was incredibly good! 

And then there's the highly anticipated onsen pool~ The view and atmosphere were great~ I really enjoyed it! The room was old but clean and spacious, which made it comfortable. They mentioned that they would be remodeling the rooms and the pool, so I think it will be even better next time I go. If I visit Beppu again, I would be willing to stay for another night!
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for your kind review and choosing the Suginoi Hotel in Beppu! 
It is nice to receive such a good feedback.
We are looking forward to welcoming you again soon!
Kind Regards
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: only good for family trip with kids. Too noisy/crowded for couples. Food not that nice
sample_comments.text: Booked one day for Japanese style room with dinner and breakfast. Hotel facilities good and staff/service r good too. However, large hotel making it too crowded and noisy all around, including the onsen and all facilities. Hotel is very suitable for kids and family trip, not quite an acceptable environment for couples. Expected Japanese style dinner but find out only buffet and foods are not that nice, just soso and numerous choice of foods. Mattress r too hard and pillow r too low. Low quality beddings and poor sleep due to it. If u have kids, I recommend this hotel as this must make them a lots of fun. But if u r couples, this hotel definitely not ur choice

As you mentioned, our hotel is a kid's heaven and more for a family travel than a romantic couple getaway. Thank you for your honest review.
We hope we could welcome you again in the future with your children. 
Yours sincerely

sample_comments.text: Excellent hotel. We stayed in Hana building with ocean view room - fantastic. If you can stay in Hana building it is more conveniently located for hotel amenities compared to the other buildings. Shuttle service is a great feature. Only downside was the buffet selection didn't seem to change at all, however we only stayed 3 nights so could just be we didn't stay long enough. Lots of choices, but not overly vegan friendly for those that care about this (mostly salad, fruit, bread, rice). Was nice to have both breakfast and dinner included though - you could easily just spend a couple days without even leaving the hotel as there is so much to do.

sample_comments.title: There's something for everyone in the family
sample_comments.text: The onsen resort has all the facilities suitable for all ages. Onsen, onsen swimming pool, 3D show, water lighting show, Game Center, bowling alley etc. The dinner was great. Best hotel buffet dinner I had with a wide range of food at good quality. I wished I had a bigger stomach.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Hui,
Thank you very much for your kind review and choosing the Suginoi Hotel in Beppu! 
We are so happy to receive such a nice feedback about our Onsen, The Aqua Garden, 3D show, water fountain show, game center and bowling alley ets., We are also glad to know our buffet dinner was best for you!
We are looking forward to welcoming you again soon!
Kind Regards
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.text: Very old style and local hotel, excellent buffet dinner and breakfast, room is big but very old style (80s/90s), you will expect to see a lot of tourist from Korea, view is great, location is excellent for us as we drive, overall the hotel is clean and value for money.

sample_comments.title: Good to spend a weekend in this hotel
sample_comments.text: Large room. Good room view. Good service. Professional staff. Lots of entertainment (espically laser show and light show). Yummy breakfast and buffet dinner.

sample_comments.title: カメラマンさんの態度で楽しいはずの旅行が最悪に
sample_comments.positives: ホテル内は清潔感あり。
sample_comments.negatives:
杉乃井ホテルさんは何度も利用してます。　
今回は星館に泊まり朝夕食ともに星館のバイキング利用。

バイキング会場内を廻ってる記念写真撮影スタッフに不満あり。
写真撮影をお断りしたところ気に障ったのかあからさまに不機嫌な態度を取られました。
こちらは失礼にならないようにと丁重にお断りしたのに、とても悲しかったです。

sample_comments.title: A really huge, nice and wonderful hotel
sample_comments.text: The hotel with good transportation service the bus stop is just 2 minutes walk near from the JR station. The hotel have 3 days lace for hot spring with good quality. The buffet dinner and breakfast were good. We enjoyed the shows provided. Many things and games to play in the hotel with good directions and instructions. The view is really great too to see the sea view! Good for couples, children, family, and also the seniors!

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: リニューアルの部屋でなかった。

sample_comments.title: Excellent Hotel with Good Facilities
sample_comments.text: The romm was very spacious and clean. The hot spring has one of the awesome view. The dinner and breafast buffets were excellent. Highly recommended for both family and couple travelers.
sample_comments.positives: Spacious room, hot-spring and free parking.

sample_comments.title: 寝不足、疲労がたまった。

sample_comments.negatives:
エアコンがうるさく眠れない。室内の温度調整が安定していない。寒すぎたり、熱すぎたりで、一晩中寝れなかった。
とても残念です。

sample_comments.title: Great for the family.
sample_comments.text: Excellent experience. This hotel is huge and is a long walk to different locations. Highly recommended for family traveling to Beppu.
sample_comments.positives: Outdoor onsen, big room, friendly staff

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives:
清潔感があってスタッフの態様が良かった。
バイキングは美味しかった。
アルコールドリンク飲み放題でデザートも美味しかった。
sample_comments.negatives:
駐車場がはなれすぎ。
星館に風呂がなく棚湯に行くのに遠すぎる。
部屋にも風呂がなくジャワーだけ。
浴衣が臭かった。

sample_comments.title: suginoi
sample_comments.text: The hotel provide onsen with swimsuite area and traditional onsen (nude) area. They also provide quick dry machine for swimsuite in dressing room. Onsens were good. Staff were active, polite and helpful. Dinner and breakfast buffet were ok. Our rooms were clean.
sample_comments.positives: onsen ,clean room,staff

sample_comments.title: 残念。
sample_comments.negatives: 夕食のバイキングは酒飲み放題じゃなくていい。昔は豪華だったのに、はっきり言って、しょぼくなった。関アジ関サバはないしフォアグラ丼もない。大切な人を初めて連れていったのに、期待を裏切らないでほしい。料理にもっと力を入れないと。あと、ステーキとフルーツのコーナーにいた女性がふてくされていた。中国人ばかりで嫌になる気持ちはわかるけど、ちゃんと指導しないと。

sample_comments.title: Great Location and a must see
sample_comments.text: Loved it... food was great and was given an upgrade of free dinners / buffet for three nights of our stay ... no other westerners there so was an experience I wouldn't of missed with all the Japanese families.. The spas are wonderful and as reported before ... YOU must try the dinner buffet ,,, Ok - is in excess but a must do .. Loved it
sample_comments.positives: Location and great food and a different experience of Japan

sample_comments.title: 本当に掃除が残念でした。

sample_comments.negatives:

はっきり言って、部屋の床が埃だらけでした。

sample_comments.title: Great with family
sample_comments.positives: Lots of facilities, staff friendly, great food

sample_comments.title: 普通
sample_comments.positives:
バイキングの料理、スタッフの対応が良かった。
浴室の洗い場が仕切られていて良い。
sample_comments.negatives:
寝室が狭くて、ベッドが引付いてベッドからの乗降りが大変でした。
フロントでの館内説明が不十分と感じた。

sample_comments.title: A treat on your holiday
sample_comments.text:
Nice place to relax and do activities all in one place without thinking or planning, especially if you get the breakfast and dinner package.

Food could do with some variety as we stayed 2 nights and it was exactly the same
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Suginoi Hotel and for sharing your wonderful review.
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and found our hotel to be a relaxing place where you could enjoy both activities and dining without needing to plan too much. We are especially pleased that our breakfast and dinner package helped make your holiday even more enjoyable.
It is also wonderful to know that you found Suginoi Hotel to be a place where you could truly relax and enjoy various experiences all in one location.
At the same time, we sincerely appreciate your feedback regarding the variety of the buffet menu during your two-night stay. We understand your thoughts and will share your comments with the relevant team as we continue striving to create an even more satisfying dining experience for guests staying multiple nights.
We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back again for another enjoyable and relaxing stay.
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Terrace and Dining Sora - Sora Kan Standard Twin with Mountain View 26 sqm

sample_comments.title: 嫌な思い出しか残らない宿泊
sample_comments.positives: 別に何もない。
sample_comments.negatives:
中館です。和室だが、せんべい布団が、床のように固いところに敷いてある。ソファーはベッドのマットのようなフロアーソファーが床に置いてあるだけで、背もたれもない。
おまけにそこには小さなゴミがたくさんあり、ちゃんと掃除してないのは明らか。この部屋では、到底くつろぐことはできない。
フロントに何度も交渉して、部屋を変えてもらったが、そこはビジネスホテルのように狭い部屋。
これで2人で40,000円は、流石に高すぎる。アメニティも最低レベル。
食事に行くのにも、外を歩くかバスに乗らないと行けない。雨降りや寒いに日などは最悪だと思う。コロナ前に比べて、食事の内容も明らかに下がってます。
今の杉乃井ホテルは、正直言って行く価値ないです。

sample_comments.title: Very good place
sample_comments.text: Best hotel! The staff are nice and very approachable. Rooms are clean and the facilities as well. Very satisfied.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for your wonderful review.
We are truly delighted to hear that you had such a satisfying stay with us and that you found our staff friendly and approachable. Your kind words about the cleanliness of our rooms and facilities are greatly appreciated and will be shared with our team.
It means a lot to us that you consider us the "best hotel." We will continue striving to provide exceptional service and a comfortable environment for all our guests.
We sincerely look forward to welcoming you again in the near future.
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Ceada Palace - Niji Kan Casual Double Room with Shower 8F 21 sqm

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: 無いかな
sample_comments.negatives: 昔のバイキング料理に比べて格段に低レベルで魅力がないけど宿泊代はしっかり取っている

sample_comments.title: The staff is very kind and everything is great.
sample_comments.text: After staying one night at Onyado Nonno in Beppu city, I stayed one night here at Suginoi Sorahkan. The view of Beppu city and the sea is amazing, and there is a kind Korean staff member at the counter, so there are no communication issues. The buffet is delicious, and the recreational facilities are so well arranged that it is incomparable to other hotels. If I come again, I will definitely choose this place.
sample_comments.response:
부부온천 스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 또한 바쁘신 와중에도 소중한 후기를 남겨 주셔서 다시 한번 감사드립니다.
소라관에 숙박하시며 벳푸 시내와 바다가 보이는 아름다운 전망을 즐기셨다니 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다.
또한 한국어가 가능한 직원에 대해 따뜻한 말씀을 남겨 주셔서 감사드리며, 편안하게 머무르실 수 있으셨다니 저희도 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다. 뷔페와 다양한 시설에 대해서도 만족해 주시고, 다른 호텔과 비교할 수 없을 정도로 좋다는 말씀까지 해 주셔서 큰 영광이며, 직원 모두에게 큰 힘이 됩니다.
"다음에도 꼭 다시 이용하고 싶다"는 소중한 말씀에 보답할 수 있도록 앞으로도 더욱 만족스러운 서비스 제공을 위해 최선을 다하겠습니다.
다음에 벳푸에 오실 기회가 있으시면 꼭 다시 방문해 주시기를 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Terrace and Dining Sora - Sora Kan Standard Twin with Mountain View 26 sqm

sample_comments.title: 期待していただけにちょっと残念な印象です。
sample_comments.positives:
部屋は狭いが機能的だったです。
食事は美味しくいただきました。また、アルコールのフリードリンクにはびっくりしました。
sample_comments.negatives:
①あまりり広くない玄関で靴を脱ぎ、ペラペラの履きづらいスリッパを履かざるをえず鬱陶しかったです。
②レストランと大浴場が別棟で、晴れていても面倒だと思いますが、雨降りの夜だったので余計に鬱陶しかったです。。楽しみにしていた大浴場に入らずじまいでした。が、入湯税は払った。

sample_comments.title: Alright!
sample_comments.text: The location is a bit disappointing, but there is a shuttle service and, above all, the facilities are good. The food was delicious. I actually found breakfast to be tastier than dinner, haha. I went with my parents and they liked it!
sample_comments.response:
이번에 저희 호텔을 이용해 주시고 소중한 후기까지 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
위치와 셔틀 이용, 부대시설, 식사 등 여러 부분에서 만족해 주셨다니 저희도 매우 기쁩니다. 특히 아침 식사를 즐겁게 드셨다니 다행입니다. 부모님께서도 만족하셨다니 저희에게도 큰 보람이 됩니다.
앞으로도 더욱 편안하고 즐거운 시간을 제공할 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다. 다시 별府에 오실 기회가 있으시면 꼭 저희 호텔에 방문해 주시기 바랍니다.
sample_comments.room_type: NIJI KAN Casual Double Room with Shower 8F

sample_comments.title: 部屋は良かったけどあまりおすすめ出来ない。
sample_comments.positives:
宙館に泊まったので部屋は非常に綺麗で快適でした。
部屋からも大浴場からも眺めが良く、素晴らしかった。
sample_comments.negatives:
宙館に泊まったのに食事は別館に行くように言われ
お風呂も食事もかなり歩いた。後から見れば確かに別館でとは書いてあるけど、こんなに移動しなくてはいけないとは思わなかった。お年寄りや子供連れにはおすすめ出来ない。食事もあまりの人の多さでゆっくり出来ず残念だった。

sample_comments.title: The high price range is the biggest complaint.
sample_comments.text: This hotel lives up to its name. It has many hot springs and plenty of facilities, but the inconvenience is the long distances to move around, and the fact that the available hot springs and breakfast locations vary depending on the building you stay in was a bit troublesome. It was a nice experience to have the option to choose a kaiseki meal instead of a dinner buffet. The kids' menu was also presented excellently in a two-tiered lunch box style. I highly recommend it for family trips.
sample_comments.response:
이번에 별부 온천 스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 바쁘신 중에 후기를 남겨주신 점에도 다시 한번 감사드립니다.
스기노이 호텔의 온천과 시설을 즐기셨다는 말씀을 직원 일동 매우 기쁘게 읽었습니다. 또한, 석식에서 가이세키 요리를 선택하시고, 키즈 메뉴에도 만족하셨다는 말씀을 들으니 매우 기쁩니다.
한편, 호텔 내 이동 거리와 건물별 온천 및 조식 이용에 불편을 끼쳐 드린 점 진심으로 사과드립니다. 보내주신 의견은 앞으로 서비스 개선에 참고하도록 하겠습니다.
가족 여행에서 스기노이 호텔에서 즐거운 시간을 보내셨다니 저희도 매우 기쁩니다. 다음 방문 시에도 더욱 편안하게 지내실 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.
다시 한 번의 방문을 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Wa Dining Hoshi - Hoshi Kan Standard Room with Mountain View 35 sqm

sample_comments.title: 失敗した
sample_comments.positives: ばいきんく
sample_comments.negatives:
ゆかたがなまがわかきのにおいがした、
へやのすみ、みえないとこにほこりがある

sample_comments.title: I went on a family trip and I was satisfied.
sample_comments.text:
I went to Hoshikan and although it took a little walk to get to the onsen, the view from the onsen was really nice.

The staff were friendly, and although it was expensive, I felt like I was truly healed and treated well. There were occasional people who spoke Korean well, and even if they didn't, they were so kind that I felt comfortable.

Because the hotel had such a great view, I couldn't go to a convenience store late at night since it was at a different elevation.

In fact, I was so relaxed from playing in the onsen that I didn't have time to have fun at night because I went to sleep.

The buffet was also very delicious, and the ice cream was really, really tasty. I drank a lot and it was great.
sample_comments.response:
스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
가족여행으로 오셔서 만족하셨다니 저희도 매우 기쁩니다. 호시칸에서 온천까지 조금 이동이 필요함에도 불구하고, 온천에서 보신 아름다운 전망을 즐겨주셨다니 다행입니다. 벳푸의 경치를 바라보며 즐기는 온천은 저희 호텔의 큰 자랑 중 하나입니다.
직원들의 친절함에 대해서도 따뜻한 말씀을 남겨주셔서 감사합니다. 한국어가 가능한 직원이 많지는 않지만, 언어와 관계없이 편안하게 느끼셨다니 무엇보다 기쁩니다. "제대로 힐링하고 대접받은 기분"이라는 표현은 저희에게 큰 힘이 됩니다.
호텔이 높은 지대에 있어 심야에 편의점을 가기에는 다소 불편하셨을 수 있지만, 온천에서 충분히 휴식을 취하시고 편안히 주무셨다니 그것 또한 여행의 좋은 추억이 되었기를 바랍니다.
뷔페와 아이스크림, 그리고 다양한 주류까지 만족하셨다니 정말 기쁩니다. 맛있는 음식과 함께한 가족 여행이 오래도록 좋은 기억으로 남기를 바랍니다.
다음에도 꼭 다시 찾아주시길 바라며, 또 한 번 편안하고 특별한 시간을 보내실 수 있도록 정성껏 준비하겠습니다. 감사합니다.
sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.title: かなり楽しみにして行ったのに、期待ハズレでした。
sample_comments.positives: たなゆ
sample_comments.negatives:
3にんのへやは、けんしゆうしつのよう。
さーひす、わるい。
こんかいより、むかしのほてるのほうか、いい。
へやの　うえのほうの　たなは　ほこりまみれ。

sample_comments.title: Suginoi Hotel is the best of the best.
sample_comments.text: During my 4-night, 5-day trip, I stayed at a hotel in Fukuoka city on the first and last nights, and while it was very small and uncomfortable, Beppu Suginoi was truly the best. The room was spacious and clean, and above all, the hot springs and the breakfast and dinner buffet were really excellent for the price. One downside was that the parking lot was far from the room since we used a rental car. However, the shuttle bus to the parking lot was frequent, so it wasn't extremely inconvenient. I do not want to go back to Fukuoka city, so next time I plan to stay at Beppu Suginoi hotel for 4 nights. But the hotel prices aren't dropping. By the way, I recommend Sorakan for those who are going.
sample_comments.response:
소중한 후기 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
4박 5일 일정 중 벳푸 스기노이 호텔에서의 시간이 가장 만족스러우셨다니 저희에게는 최고의 칭찬입니다. 객실의 넓이와 청결함, 온천, 조식과 저녁 뷔페까지 가격 대비 훌륭했다고 말씀해 주셔서 진심으로 기쁩니다.
렌터카를 이용하셔서 주차장과 객실 간 거리가 다소 멀게 느껴지셨다는 점은 불편을 드려 죄송합니다. 다행히 셔틀버스를 통해 큰 불편 없이 이용하셨다니 안심이 됩니다. 앞으로도 더욱 편리하게 이용하실 수 있도록 지속적으로 개선해 나가겠습니다.
다음에는 벳푸 스기노이 호텔에서만 4박을 계획하고 계시다니 정말 감사한 말씀입니다. 숙박 요금에 대해서도 부담을 느끼신다는 점을 잘 알고 있으며, 가격에 걸맞은, 그 이상으로 만족하실 수 있는 경험을 제공하기 위해 계속 노력하겠습니다.
소라칸을 추천해 주신 점도 감사드립니다. 다음 방문에서도 다시 한 번 최고의 추억을 만들어 드릴 수 있기를 기대하겠습니다.
다시 뵙기를 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.
sample_comments.room_type: HOSHI KAN Standard Room with Ocean View

The room was in a clean condition and had water filter machine, yutaka to wear to onsen, etc. Aqua garden and gold gym were all free of charge and they were great but the best part was the included breakfast at Hoshi Kan. The food was exceptional and the view is absolutely stunning.

Only thing that could be improved is that the building does not have parking and they operate a shuttle from the parking lot to the hotel building without a specific time table. We waited in the cold in the dark parking lot not knowing when the shuttle bus will be coming.

But still highly recommend!

We are delighted to hear that you had a wonderful time with us and that you were satisfied with the cleanliness of your room, the in-room amenities, and our facilities such as the Aqua Garden and Gold Gym.
It is especially gratifying to know that you enjoyed the breakfast at Hoshi Kan, and that both the quality of the food and the stunning view left a strong impression on you.
On the other hand, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced regarding the parking and shuttle bus service.

sample_comments.text: From the moment of arrival, the staff were very kind and helped carry our luggage, and the room was clean and wonderful! It was quiet, and I wasn't bothered by the surrounding noise. We chose a plan that included dinner and breakfast, and the food was delicious, with a wide variety, plus all-you-can-drink... My husband said it was truly heaven for those who drink alcohol. The bathroom was a bit far away, which was a downside, but there are souvenir shops and game centers along the way, so it shouldn't be an issue for younger people. We had elderly people with us this time, so the elevator being far away was a bit challenging! Overall, we were able to enjoy our time without any problems. Thank you very much!

sample_comments.positives: スタッフの対応が良かった。
sample_comments.negatives: 食事するのに待たされるのはどうかと思う。

sample_comments.title: Very good.
sample_comments.text:
The facility is an all-in-one, with everything you need. I stayed for one night this time to take a look as a reference for the next family trip accommodation, and I recommend those coming to Suginoi to stay for multiple nights. If you want to take your time and enjoy, one night feels quite tight.

I recommend making a reservation at Sorakan rather than Hoshikan, and if you choose an ocean view, you can see the entire city of Beppu from your room without needing to go to the Beppu ropeway or tower. Sorakan has outdoor hot springs available only to guests on the top floor, so it is not crowded and can be enjoyed comfortably. You can also see the surrounding scenery from Sorayu, so I do not recommend going to the aforementioned ropeway or tower; the hotel's view is that good. 

Additionally, the facilities include an arcade, game room (bowling, darts, table tennis, etc.), photo spots, souvenir shop, and a Seven-Eleven, making it quite convenient. The rooms are spacious and in good condition.

The evening meal is of such high quality that it reminds me of Signiel. The Beppu station operates a lounge, and there is a shuttle bus for easy transportation. Based on my multiple visits to Beppu, if you are looking for a comfortable and convenient travel accommodation, this place seems to be the best among modern facilities in Beppu, aside from a few high-quality ryokans.

Finally, at checkout, I had to rush to call a taxi, but they quickly turned on the app for the shuttle, saying that it was enough to get there in time, which saved transportation costs and allowed me to comfortably finish my Beppu itinerary. Thank you to the staff member at the front desk, Ran Ran.
sample_comments.response:
저희 벳푸 온천 스기노이 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
또한 세심하고 따뜻한 후기를 남겨 주셔서 진심으로 감사의 말씀을 드립니다.

소라칸의 넓고 쾌적한 객실과 아름다운 오션뷰, 다양한 부대시설, 그리고 석식의 품질까지 만족하셨다니 저희에게 큰 기쁨이 되었습니다.
고객님께서 말씀해 주신 것처럼, 스기노이 호텔은 가족 단위 여행객 분들께서 편리하고 즐겁게 휴식을 취하실 수 있도록 다양한 시설을 갖추고 있습니다.

또한 이동의 편리함을 위해 셔틀버스 및 여러 편의시설을 운영하고 있으며, 고객님께서 이를 유용하게 이용하셨다니 정말 다행입니다.

앞으로도 고객님께서 "다시 오고 싶은 호텔"로 기억하실 수 있도록, 저희 전 직원이 진심을 다해 서비스 품질 향상에 노력하겠습니다.

다음에 다시 뵙는 날을 진심으로 기대하며, 항상 건강과 행복이 함께하시길 바랍니다. 감사합니다.
sample_comments.room_type: SORA KAN Deluxe Room with Ocean View

sample_comments.positives: スタッフの対応は良かったと思います。
sample_comments.negatives:

品数は多い方だったが、味は普通。

sample_comments.title: Great cost performance
sample_comments.text:
I visited with children, and since there were many families, we were able to enjoy the baths and meals without worrying too much about our surroundings. Additionally, the prices were low, so I didn't expect much from the buffet or room, but the buffet had a wide variety of delicious options that everyone, young and old, could enjoy. The room was new in the Star Pavilion and was spacious enough. We were able to relax in the棚湯 (shelf bath) while enjoying a beautiful view.

If I were to point out a negative aspect, it would be that when entering the棚湯, it was summer vacation, so there were many pool guests, and since we shared the same changing room, it got quite crowded. It was at a level where a separate changing room should be provided. Also, the staff members at the reception were not informed about the parking situation, and despite moving a considerable distance to the designated parking lot, we were told it was full and to go to a different location, which was quite a hassle. The elevator was narrow, and the lineup was long.

Other than that, there were many staff members, and each had their own responsibilities, so the service was good. When a foreign guest was bathing with their hair down, a staff member came over to remind them. When I reported a girl wandering in the bathroom in a yukata while holding her phone, they responded immediately.

Some staff lacked smiles, but most were kind and friendly. I really enjoyed my stay at Suginoi Hotel; it was quite cost-effective.
sample_comments.response:
この度は杉乃井ホテルにご宿泊いただき、また詳しいご感想をお寄せいただきありがとうございます。
星館でのご滞在やビュッフェ、棚湯での景色など、ご満足いただけたとのこと、大変嬉しく拝見いたしました。

一方で、棚湯の更衣室の混雑や駐車場案内でのご不便など、貴重なご意見もありがとうございます。いただいた内容は、今後の改善点としてスタッフ間で共有し、より快適に過ごしていただけるよう努めてまいります。

コスパ面でもお楽しみいただけたとのお言葉に励まされます。またご家族皆さまでお越しいただける日を、スタッフ一同心よりお待ちしております。

sample_comments.text: I stayed at the Star Pavilion. The room was clean. The view from the ocean-facing room was excellent. Also, the buffet at the Star Pavilion was amazing, with a wide variety of options from Japanese to Western food, including desserts. It was top class in the nation. My elementary school son loved the aqua beat and went down the slide multiple times. There were also darts, bowling, and a souvenir corner (it was incredible). The hot spring was also wonderful; it helped relieve fatigue. My son didn't want to go home and threw a tantrum, which was tough. In September, I was even made to promise that we would go again.

다시 한 번 저희 호텔을 이용해 주시기를 부탁드리며, 다음 방문을 스태프 일동, 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다. 감사합니다.

sample_comments.title: Space Hotel Stay
sample_comments.text:
The Chukan was a calm and sophisticated accommodation. It was connected to Cedar Palace, where I could enjoy projection mapping and a fountain show at the rooftop pool. The meals were abundant in variety and high in quality, leaving me very satisfied. 

The staff's service was excellent, and I had a comfortable stay.
sample_comments.response:
このたびは杉乃井ホテル 宙館にご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございます。

落ち着いた雰囲気や洗練された空間でのご滞在を快適にお過ごしいただけたご様子、また、シーダパレスでのプロジェクションマッピングや屋上プールの噴水ショーなどもお楽しみいただけたとのこと、大変うれしく拝読いたしました。

さらに、お食事やスタッフの対応についてもお褒めのお言葉を頂戴し、私どもにとって何よりの励みでございます。これからもご期待に添えるよう、サービスと施設のさらなる向上に努めてまいります。

またのご来館を心よりお待ち申し上げております。

Other than that, the food was delicious, the view was amazing, and my whole family enjoyed it. 

Next, I want to go to the Sky Pavilion to swim in the summer pool!

There's a large entertainment center and souvenir shop in the basement, which is good, and the hotel facilities were clean and nice. Of course, the price is a bit high, though. ^^

sample_comments.title: I really like the swimming pool.
sample_comments.text: A place where the facilities are everything. I really liked it. However, I heard that it's better than the buffets in Korea, but that's definitely not true~!^^ The Lotte or Shilla buffets are much tastier, haha. If you expect an average buffet, it'll be similar, I think. Haha, it gets a bit salty and sweet, so I got tired of it quicklyㅠ I mostly ate vegetables. I did it for two days, but I thought I should have just included meals for one day haha. But the pool and large bath are totally ~~~super satisfactory~~ and all the staff are very friendly.

sample_comments.positives:
窓が少しだけ開くので空気の入れ替えができて良い。
ちょうど冬至で内湯の中に柚子？が沢山浮いてました。防音もしっかりしていて雑音もなく部屋はとても静かに過ごせました。エレベーターも沢山あるのでボタンを押せばどれかがすぐに到着します。宙館専用の温泉があるのでエレベーターに乗れば気軽に温泉まで行けます。清掃の方が常にいる感じで整っていて気持ちよかったです。

後、食事の中のスタッフさん外国人の方が多いように感じましたが(それは全然問題ではなく)お国柄もあるのでしょうが笑顔ひとつなくムスっとした感じの方がチラホラ。仕事を淡々とこなしてるだけと言う印象。連泊でしたがずっと同じでした。

The view of the town from the hotel is stunning. Breakfast is a must as well! Very good buffet spread at Terrace & Dining Sora. One of the most memorable dishes was the tamago tempura which still had a gooey center.
sample_comments.response: Thank you very much for staying with us and your kind review. We are glad to know you had enjoyed your stay. We are looking forward to welcoming you again in near future.

sample_comments.title: 高額な朝食付きの温泉リゾート風ビジネスホテル
sample_comments.positives:
朝食バイキングの種類が多く色々な料理が食べられて良かった。子供連れにはすごく楽しい施設だと思った。
温水プールや別府市街と海が見渡せる屋上の温泉大浴場があり、こちらも子供連れには楽しい施設だと思った。
sample_comments.negatives:
部屋が狭く景色も見えず内装もビジネスホテルとほぼ同じだったのでがっかりした。小物を置く机も無く、むしろビジネスホテルの方が使い勝手は良いかも。
アメニティーもビジネスホテルと同じ方式でフロントでプラスチックのくしや綿棒などを持って行くスタイルも宿泊料に見合っていないと感じた。
部屋に入って履き物を脱ぐスペースが非常に狭く（扉が内開きの為）いちいち履物がドアに引っ掛かって大変だった。
別館内の大浴場に向かう途中の長い廊下が土足OKと土足禁止の表示が非常に分かりにくく、多くの人が（外国人？）外履きのまま土足禁止エリアを歩いており、まじめな日本人が裸足で汚い廊下を歩くのはおかしいと思った。全部土足OKにして、脱衣所の直前で全員が履き物を脱ぐようにした方が良いと思った。
昨今の人手不足で致し方ないとはいえ、スタッフがほぼ全員外国人で、たどたどしい日本語での案内には東南アジアのホテルに泊まったような錯覚を覚えた。
温泉大浴場を利用したが、プールのような消毒液の匂いがして、温泉というより熱めの温水プールのような感じ。大量の宿泊客が入るので衛生面で致し方ないとは思うが、せっかく別府温泉に来たのに温泉ぽさを全く感じないのは残念。

sample_comments.title: 満喫できます
sample_comments.positives:
宙館はお風呂、食事(バイキング)は宙館宿泊者専用でホテル内なので移動はエレベーターのみで快適でした。バイキングもそれなりに満足しました。何よりスタッフの方々の気遣いがとても良かったです。お部屋も落ち着いた感じで解放感があり、お布団もフワフワでした。
チェックアウトも自動精算機なのでスムーズです。エレベーターも沢山あるのですぐに乗れます。部屋の窓は15センチほどは開くので空気の入れ替えはできて嬉しかったです。
sample_comments.negatives:
宿泊者専用の立体駐車場から少し距離があり寒い日や暑い日は大変かなと思いました(ずっと坂道なので)宙館はホテルのすぐ側に平地の駐車場もあるようですが、早めに到着すれば停められるかも？です。
宙館宿泊者は棚湯にも入れますが移動がかなりありました。
お部屋でひとつだけ残念に思ったのが背もたれのある椅子がなかったので、ゆったりと座る事ができませんでした。

sample_comments.title: I love traveling with my child!!
sample_comments.text: I stayed for 2 nights with my 23-month-old child. We used the breakfast included at the Sorakwan, and the large public bath on the 13th floor was so nice that we used it four times. The night sky from the outdoor hot spring was especially beautiful. There is a connecting corridor from Sorakwan to the main building, but you have to go down the stairs twice, making it inconvenient to access with a stroller. On the way to the main building, there is a kids' cafe-like play area (paid) and a game center near the bowling alley. The Aqua Garden has an outdoor heated pool and hosts several fountain shows in the evening. The breakfast at Sorakwan was very convenient as all the children's utensils were provided. For dinner, we had ramen within a 10-minute walk and sushi within a 10-minute drive, but my child fell asleep on the way to both, so we only brought back sushi (egg sushi) to eat at the accommodation. I am currently traveling in Fukuoka and highly recommend the Suginoi Hotel near African Safari Yufuin! It's great to come here with kids, and I would love to come back with my parents as well!
sample_comments.response:
この度は別府温泉 杉乃井ホテルをご利用くださいまして、誠にありがとうございます。 
また、お忙しい中クチコミをご投稿いただきましたこと、重ねて御礼申し上げます。 
お寄せいただきましたコメントから、ご滞在をお楽しみいただけたご様子、何よりでございます。
これからもお客様満足度の向上に努めてまいりますので、是非またご利用くださいますようお願い申し上げます。

sample_comments.title: まあ、こんなもの。
sample_comments.positives: 建物が新しく清潔感があった。客が多く心配してた温泉は思ったより人も少なくゆったり入れてたいへん楽しめた。
sample_comments.negatives: 宙館でしたが、食事はシーダでした、テラスとわけた理由は？シーダまでの移動は遠すぎる。シーダは動線が長く席間が狭くゴミゴミして、気分、気持ちが、悪かった。食べ物もぬるく、味付けもイマイチでおいしいとは思えなかった。テラスを覗くとゆったりしてたので、それだけで気持ちよく食事できたかもですね。とにかく、今のシーダはつまらんよ、子供連れならいいが大人だけの場合には気になるところばかり。働いてる方々は、感じないのかな？　食事場所も選べるようにして欲しいと思うが？初めてのかたは、そんなの知らないし選べないかな？　大人ばかりの席と子連れの場所を分けるとか、座敷席作るとかするといくらかいいかも？　ただのバイキングであり、なんの目玉もない、そういう案内もない、部屋と温泉には◎つけるけど、食事は×です。

sample_comments.title: The best family hotel!
sample_comments.text:
This is our second visit and as a family with 2 young children, this is really the best hotel for families. The Sora Kan building is new and really nice. We booked a room for 4 people and there was a tatami area with tatami for the children to sleep and they really enjoyed that experience. Apart from the acqua garden which is a heated pool, the kids also enjoyed the onsen which has pools of different temperatures (they usually think the traditional onsen temperature is too hot, so they loved that there were pools suitable for them here)

Would definately recommend to families with kids.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for your kind review and choosing the Suginoi Hotel in Beppu! 
It is nice to receive such a good feedback.
We are looking forward to welcoming you again soon!
Kind Regards
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: 次は杉乃井で無くても良いかな。

sample_comments.title: Nice buffet dinner and great view
sample_comments.text: A very huge hotel comes with lots of entertainment and onsens. Got a room that facing the mountain view but I would advise to get a room facing the seaview. The seaview is super nice. Dinner buffet was another delight. Super delicious with unlimited fresh sashimi, lamb, beef etc. Even, half way during our dining, there were some musical performances by a group of Caucasians came in and sang some beautiful songs. You can choose your own tables either indoor or outdoor. There is a public large onsen pool (aqua garden) that can wear swimming attire while enjoying your hot bath and watching the 3D water show. Don't forget to try their naked onsen after the public large pool as you were blessed with a magnificent night view! Super nice view! The only drawback was one of the staff (Indian or sri Lankan) was a wee bit rude as he stopped us while we were about to enter the hotel from shuttle bus, to check in by 3pm. We have to tell him that we were due for check in! He should have welcome us and asked how can I help you. The way he stopped us from entering was very rude cos every customers came into the hotel either they were a genuine hotel guest or just merely come for a visit. Shouldn't be treated like not welcome! I would suggest to teach the staff for better and friendly approach! It did spoil my mood
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for your kind review. 
It is nice to know you enjoyed our hotel very much.
On the other hands, we are sorry one of our staff was upset you.
He should have said hello, how may I help you first before stopping you.
He was new and too busy to ask your name to get a reservation information and stopped you. We are very sorry for the situation.
We must try to make the best efforts to improve every service, aiming to be a good hotel. We are looking forward to welcoming you again soon! 
Sincerely yours
Sguioi Hotel

The view from spa/hot spring is very beautiful. My son like playing bowling (they provide one free game for hotel guest). Breakfast is good as well. I should have stayed there more than 1 day.

sample_comments.title: Great onsen resort
sample_comments.text: We stayed at Suginoi's twin mountain view room. It really had a spectacular view, as the room had a large span of windows. In the room itself, there was a tatami section separate from the beds, which was nice. The bathroom in room was very spacious. There were noticeable amounts of dust in the wooden panelling along the walls by the beds but otherwise the room was clean. The dinner and breakfast buffets were great, but the outdoor onsens were the real experience. At night, you overlook the lights of Beppu city and during the day, the lovely view of the ocean. There are frequent shuttles between the 3 buildings, all walkable distances. Even though there were lots of families with children, it was still quiet and enjoyable at night.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Fannie,
Thank you very much for your kind review and choosing the Suginoi Hotel in Beppu! 
We are glad to know you like our room, but we are sorry for the dust in the wooden panelling along the walls by bed. We will make sure to clean the dust.
We are also glad you enjoed the view from our hotel room Ocean side.
We are looking forward to welcoming you again soon!
Kind Regards
Suginoi Hotel

sample_comments.title: A great onsen experience
sample_comments.text:
While in Northern Kyushu, my wife and I naturally gravitated towards the onsen town of Beppu. Our choice of the Suginoi was based on reviews here and it promised to give us the "full deal". We were not disappointed. We spent 3 nights at the resort.
From the moment we signed in, everything was as it should be. We had a mountain view room (at this time of year a much better sight that the ocean view) and this was the largest room, I have ever had in Japan - absolutely huge - bigger that many U.S. suites. 
We had full board - both breakfast and supper. After eating much too much the first day, we decided on what the best dishes were and focused on them for the rest of the time there. After 3 days however, the repetition starts to wear. This is compounded by the fact that the kitchen is pounding out at least 600 meals a day.
It was cold during our stay, but the hot onsen made up for it.
We had a great stay.
sample_comments.positives: Onsen - Views - Food

sample_comments.title: 満足はしてるけど、残念！
sample_comments.positives:

・部屋、屋上浴室からの景観が最高によかった。
sample_comments.negatives:
・マナーが悪い海外の団体が多すぎました。
・夕食、朝食ともにレストラン前で並んでからの入場はなぜ⁇
・夕食時の白飯がべちゃべちゃでした。
・自動販売機、製氷機が各階にあってもいいのでは？
・部屋のガラス棚、置いてある調度品がほこりだらけでした。

sample_comments.title: 良かった

sample_comments.title: Great stay
sample_comments.text: I love the stay. Although this hotel is quite more expensive than other hotels in Beppu and located quite far from the Beppu station, you will not regret once you get there. There is a free shuttle bus service and the driver was really polite. The room is unbelievably huge and perfect clean. The view was great. You can see city, mountain and ocean at the same time. Two pools were awesome. There are six rides and two mini pools in Aqua beat which only opens in Summer. I recommend you to bring your own tubes as rental fee is quite expensive. The spa was fantastic. All the staffs were really kind. I did not book the dinner and breakfast as I planned to go to local restaurants. Local restaurants near the station were great. I stayed here just one night, but the next time, I would love to stay here at least 2 nights as there are so many things to enjoy.
sample_comments.positives: Huge room, Wonderful Pool&Spa, Kind Staffs

sample_comments.title: たかい
sample_comments.negatives: たかい

sample_comments.title: A hotel with a panoramic view of the Beppu city
sample_comments.text: The hotel is located on the hill, about 15 minutes by car from JR Beppu railway station. From the 15th floor of the main building, you can see a panoramic view of the Beppu city and the bay. The hotel also has amusement facilities (such as game center and shopping center) and open air onsen "Tanayu" (free for the hotel's guest) where you can also see the magnificent view of Beppu city. Transportation is very easy since there is a shuttle bus between the hotel and JR Beppu railway station.
sample_comments.positives: Open air onsen (hot spring bath)

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: オイリーなボディーソープでしたが、流したときに全くスッキリしないのでお湯を5倍以上使いました。好き好きだとは思いますが、私のような感覚の人もいると思うので、お湯の消費を減らすためにも変更したほうがいいと感じました。

sample_comments.title: Huge Hotel, biggest i have seen in Japan.
sample_comments.text: I did use their free bus service which worked like a charm, they even offered a bus from one hotel building to the next and told me i need 10 minutes to walk from one building to the next (actually i needed around 5 minutes). The onsen facilities were top notch and not overcrowded , very good water quality, excellent late night light show in the outdoor onsen. Internet only in the lobby but it was free wifi. Resteraunts were very good. The hotel room and the view was great, the room was the hugest i have seen in japan it was like 2 big rooms in one , one was a japanese room in standard size , and the other part was western style and both parts were bigger then a normal hotel room. The beds were very confy. I had the best stay in japan i had the last 5 years and the best hotel i have ever been.
sample_comments.positives: Awesome onsen facilities, open around the clock , great facilities (bowling, shopping, game center ect.)

sample_comments.title: A large amusement hotel!
sample_comments.text:
I stayed at the Star Pavilion. The room was on the mountain side, but it was very spacious and had a big sofa, making it comfortable to spend time there. The restaurant on the top floor offered a buffet for breakfast and dinner while overlooking Beppu Bay. Even with many guests staying, it wasn't too crowded, and I could get the food smoothly. During dinner, there was also an all-you-can-drink alcohol option. 

The facility was large, and I walked a lot, but since I ate too much, it was nice to move around moderately. At night, we could see the fountain show and projection mapping, and there were even a bowling alley, pool, and Gold's Gym, so I think the hotel life was extremely fulfilling. The hot spring was also great! I want to go again!
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Wa Dining Hoshi - Hoshi Kan Standard Room with Mountain View 35 sqm

sample_comments.title: Fantastic accommodation
sample_comments.text: I can't forget watching the sunrise at Tanayu with my mom 10 years ago, so I went again with my husband for a renewal. The staff were as friendly as before, and my husband was very satisfied with the buffet food and unlimited alcohol. Since it was our wedding anniversary, I made a reservation in advance and even got a pretty dessert for 1000 yen~ However, we couldn't eat it because it was burned and covered in powder... It was an unforgettable memory. We had a great 2-night stay and want to go again~~~
sample_comments.response:
이번에는 스기노이 호텔에 숙박해 주시고 따뜻한 후기를 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
10년 전 어머님과 함께 타나유에서 보셨던 일출의 추억을 잊지 못하시고, 이번에는 남편분과 다시 찾아주셨다는 말씀에 매우 감동하였습니다. 오랜 시간이 지나 다시 찾아주신 소중한 여행이 좋은 추억으로 이어진 것 같아 저희도 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다.
예전과 변함없이 직원들의 친절함을 느끼셨고, 뷔페와 무제한 주류도 만족스럽게 즐겨주셨다니 큰 보람을 느낍니다. 특히 결혼기념일이라는 특별한 여행에 저희 호텔을 선택해 주신 점, 진심으로 감사드립니다.
한편, 기념 디저트의 불꽃 장식으로 인해 가루가 떨어져 아쉬움을 드린 점은 죄송하게 생각합니다. 소중한 기념일이었기에 더욱 만족스러운 순간이 되었어야 했는데 아쉬움을 남겨드린 점 마음에 담아두겠습니다.
그래도 "잊지 못할 추억"이었다는 말씀과 함께 2박 동안 편히 쉬셨고 또 방문하고 싶다고 해주신 말씀은 저희에게 무엇보다 큰 기쁨입니다.
다음에도 소중한 분과 함께 다시 찾아주시길 바라며, 또 만나 뵐 날을 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Terrace and Dining Sora - Sora Kan Standard Twin with Mountain View 26 sqm

sample_comments.title: Hot spring resort
sample_comments.text: The overall experience was quite good. The restaurant we booked was very busy on the weekend, and we had to wait for a while for dinner. The dining experience included sashimi, sushi, steak, some drinks, and Haagen-Dazs ice cream, all of which tasted quite good. For breakfast, there were juices, grilled fish, salmon, etc., and the quality was good. It seemed that there were more two-person tables by the window, and the view was great. The service was excellent. There were many tourist facilities, the light show was beautiful, and the shuttle bus was very convenient, allowing you to reach the station from the hotel without getting wet in the rain. Overall, it was very good.
sample_comments.response:
感谢您入住杉乃井酒店，并与我们分享如此详细的入住感想。
得知您在宙馆度过了愉快的温泉度假时光，我们感到非常高兴。虽然周末晚餐时段较为繁忙，需要稍作等候，但您依然对晚餐与早餐的品质给予高度评价，我们深感荣幸。
看到您喜欢生鱼片、寿司、牛排、冰淇淋以及早餐丰富的餐点内容，也很开心您能一边欣赏窗外景色、一边享受用餐时光。
此外，您提到灯光秀、馆内设施以及接驳车服务都为旅程增添便利与乐趣，我们全体员工备受鼓舞。即使遇到下雨天气，也能舒适移动，这正是我们希望为宾客提供的安心与便利。
今后我们也将继续努力，为每位宾客带来更加舒适愉快的度假体验。期待您再次来到杉乃井酒店，与我们共度美好时光。

sample_comments.title: Family trip
sample_comments.text: I have been curious about this place for a while because I heard the meals are delicious, and this time I stayed here since my child was on spring break. The room was very clean and well-maintained. It had a free water server, and there was a shared ice machine in the hallway where I could get ice for free, allowing me to enjoy my drinks at a leisurely pace. The meals were a buffet with fresh sashimi, meat, and a wide variety of drinks, which I found very satisfying. I was also surprised to see packs of baby food with rice and side dishes available. This is my No. 1 hotel I want to stay at again. Thank you very much!!
sample_comments.response:
この度は杉乃井ホテルにご宿泊いただきまして、誠にありがとうございます。
また、以前よりお食事にご興味をお持ちいただき、この度のご利用に繋がりましたこと、大変嬉しく存じます。
お部屋の清潔さや設備につきましてご満足いただけたとのこと、安心いたしました。ウォーターサーバーや製氷機もご活用いただき、ご家族でゆったりとしたひとときをお過ごしいただけたご様子が伝わり、何よりでございます。
また、お食事に関しましても、お刺身やお肉、お酒の種類にご満足いただけたとのお言葉を頂戴し、大変光栄でございます。離乳食のご用意につきましても、小さなお子様連れのお客様に安心してお楽しみいただけるよう取り組んでおりますため、お役に立てましたことを嬉しく思います。
「また宿泊したいホテルNo.1」とのお言葉は、私どもにとって何よりの励みでございます。今後もご期待にお応えし続けられるよう、より一層努めてまいります。
ぜひまたご家族皆様でお越しいただけます日を、心よりお待ち申し上げております。
sample_comments.room_type: Buffet Breakfast and Dinner Included - Wa Dining Hoshi - Hoshi Kan Standard Room with Ocean View 35 sqm

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: バイキング料理が最高でした

sample_comments.title: The scenery, hospitality, and hot springs are all fantastic!
sample_comments.text:
I stayed at the "Sora-kan" of Beppu Suginoi Hotel, which I had wanted to visit for a long time, to celebrate my husband's retirement! It's new and at a high altitude, so both the facilities and the views are beautiful. The staff were kind, immediately helped with our luggage, and guided us to the front desk as soon as we arrived. They also sent us to a convenience store 200 meters below by microbus, which was very helpful. 

The hot spring had a large bath exclusively for "Sora-kan," but there is a high fence to prevent views from outside, so we had to walk a bit to get there. However, the棚湯 (Tana-yu) offered better views and variety, complete with a glass sauna, which was better in my opinion. 

Dinner was in a venue exclusive to "Sora-kan," with free drinks (including alcohol) and many dishes prepared right in front of us. As a sweets lover, I found it amazing that they made mont-blanc using a machine that drizzled the chestnut cream over sponge cake! 

It was such a large scale experience that one day was not enough to fully enjoy it; next time, I plan to explore the whole hotel. I feel like this was the best hotel I have ever stayed in. 

I've often had bad experiences booking through Agoda (like reservations not being confirmed, breakfast for one instead of two, or being assigned to low floors with issues), but perhaps because I booked six months in advance this time, we got a great room on a high floor, which was wonderful!
sample_comments.response:
この度は別府温泉杉乃井ホテルを御利用いただきまして誠にありがとうございます。
また、ご多用の中、口コミをご投稿いただきました事、重ねてお礼申し上げます。
数多あるホテル旅館の中から、ご主人様のご退職という大切な節目のご旅行に、当ホテルをお選びいただきましたこと、心よりお祝い申し上げます。
宙館でのご滞在につきまして、景色や施設、スタッフの対応に至るまでご満足いただけたご様子を拝見し、大変嬉しく存じます。また、ご到着時のご案内や送迎サービスにつきましてもお役に立てたとのこと、何よりでございます。
温泉につきましては、それぞれの魅力をお楽しみいただけたご様子が窺え、お食事もライブキッチンやスイーツなどをご堪能いただけたようで「今まで泊まったホテルで一番」とのお言葉まで頂戴し、身に余る光栄でございます。
これからも皆様にご満足いただけるご滞在をご提供できますよう、より一層サービス向上に努めてまいります。
ぜひ次回は館内のさまざまな施設もご体験いただき、さらにお楽しみいただけましたら幸いでございます。スタッフ一同、心よりお待ち申し上げております。

sample_comments.text: On our wedding anniversary, we received warm words from the staff. The onsen, meals, and room were all excellent. It became the best anniversary. I would like to come back again. This time we stayed in the Center Mansion, so I was glad to be able to enjoy the Sky Bath and Shelf Bath. Next time, I would like to stay at a different star mansion and see it.

大切なご結婚記念日に当館をお選びいただきましたこと、心より御礼申し上げます。スタッフへの温かいお言葉、そして「一番良い記念日になりました」とのお声を頂戴し、私どもも胸が熱くなる思いで拝見いたしました。
温泉・お料理・お部屋すべてにご満足いただけたとのこと、大変嬉しく存じます。宙館にご宿泊いただいたことで、宙湯や棚湯もお楽しみいただけたとのこと、素敵なひとときをお過ごしいただけ何よりでございます。

sample_comments.title: First time at Suginoi.
sample_comments.text: I wanted to take my grandmother, so I went to Suginoi for the first time!!! The place I stayed at was the Hoshikan! There were many kinds of buffets, and there were staff who took photos, so I was able to purchase the photos in the morning! The hot springs were nice, the room was clean, and we had fun playing at the game center at night, making it enjoyable for both adults and children!!! The staff's response was very good; when I spilled soup at the buffet, they quickly wiped it up and asked if I was okay, and when my son got the slippers dirty, they immediately brought new slippers. Their service was excellent!!! It was a hotel I wanted to visit again! It became a wonderful memory!

また、ご多用の中、心温まる口コミをご投稿いただきましたこと、重ねて御礼申し上げます。
大切なおばあ様とのご旅行に、当ホテルをお選びいただきましたこと、大変光栄に存じます。星館でのご滞在をはじめ、バイキングのお食事や温泉、客室、ゲームコーナーなど、皆様でお楽しみいただけたご様子を嬉しく拝読いたしました。
さらに、レストランや館内におけるスタッフの対応につきまして、温かいお言葉をお寄せいただき誠にありがとうございます。お食事の際やお子様のスリッパの件など、スタッフの対応にご安心いただけたとのことは、私どもにとりまして何よりの励みでございます。頂戴いたしましたお言葉は関係部署へ共有し、今後のサービス向上に活かしてまいります。
